Type

Collection System

Details

Introduced

Update v15.00

Overview


The Character Collection Book is a feature in Fortnite: Battle Royale, first introduced in Chapter 2: Season 5, that details all Characters.

You must find and interact with these Characters to fill the Book. If you get all Locations of a Character, a golden badge symbol will appear on the picture of the Characters and the progress bar will turn gold.

Some Characters can be found in more than one Location.

Collection Book List

  • Chapter 6
  • Chapter 5
  • Chapter 4
  • Chapter 3
  • Chapter 2

  • C7S3
  • C7S2
  • C7S1

 Marge Simpson I just think she's neat! Evergreen Terrace

08
 Sizzle She makes this look cheesy. Corruption Corners

 Homer Simpson D'oh! Springfield Nuclear Power Plant

 Fred Let's split up, gang! Near Ranger's Rest

 The Mothman He's a man... bird... something? Near Viney Shafts

 Peely Bone He's probably going to be fine. Near Open-Air Onsen

 Spooky Team Leader Find delight in fright. Near Freaky Fields

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Bushranger He's one scrappy little tree. Nightshift Forest
02
 Cinder All it takes is one little spark. Open-Air Onsen
03
 Doughberman Rise with the dawn and lift 'til night. Masked Meadows
04
 Durrr Taisho If you can't take the heat, stay outta the wasabi. Seaport City
05
 Helsie Adventure-seeker. Vampire staker. Boba master. Canyon Crossing
06
 Goldie Run the game. BURD
07

  • C5S4

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Andy Fangerson Party animal full of tricks and treats. Grim Gate
02
 Artemis Goddess of the moonlit hunt.
The last of the pantheon to remain on the Island, Artemis has grown too fond of its denizens to leave them to suffer under Doom's wrath. But what secrets does the goddess of the moonlit hunt still hold? 		Underworld Station
03
 Brite Raider Drive fast. Burn bright.
Brite Raider seems to be adjusting well to her post-wasteland environment. Sure, the Island is in peril, but at least she's not getting sand in her food anymore. Sandy snacks aside, she's ready to face the battle - and Doctor Doom - head-on. 		Brite Raider's House
04
 Captain Jones Take up the shield of justice.
Peely's been rescued. The gods, banished. Megalo Don, humbled. And now the Island faces Doom. It's time to set aside vengeance, and slip into something a little more heroic. It's time for Captain Jones. 		Ship It! Station
05
 Centurion Hazard Platoon's extraction expert and munitions master.
The wasteland was not really Centurion's thing: chaos, sand, a general lack of order. But everyone coming together to fight a supervillain? Now THAT Centurion is excited for! 		Piney Lane
06
 Dark Ruby Extinguish their shine. Rebel's Roost
07
 Edward Scissorhands An uncommonly gentle man. Grand Glacier
08
 Gwenpool I played the Galactus Event. That makes me an Avenger, right?
Good evening, m'gamer. Name's Gwendolyn Poole, and I'm beginning to think I might be the only person in the whole locker who actually knows they're in Fortnite. So... Should we crank some 90s, or what? 		Reckless Railways
09
 Heroic Hope See a brighter future.
Being the subject of a world-ending prophecy is tough, but Hope is tougher... she hopes. As her faceoff with Doctor Doom looms ever nearer, Hope is focused on assembling reality's finest heroes to join her in battle. Will you squad up? 		Sandy Steppes
10
 Iron Man The Avengers' benefactor and creator of a gamma powered Battle Bus. The Other Windmill
11
 Mephisto An extra-dimensional demon who rules a fiery kingdom. The Underworld
12
 Knightmare Warrior of the midnight rift. Mount Olympus
13
 Nisha An honorable duelist in a dishonorable Society.
Turning her back on her Society brethren, Nisha has... reluctantly... joined Hope and The Underground in the fight against Doom. Even if the aesthetic isn't really her thing. 		Snooty Station
14
 Peabody Phil, Earl and Axle. Three peas in a podcoat.
After the refinery, Phil, Earl and Axle have chosen to triple down on Pea Bois. Business is...well, was booming. Now they need to find the next hot sales opportunity. 		Pea Bois HQ
15
 Peely Bone He's probably going to be fine. Restored Reels
16
 Pumpkin King Make way for the king of the pumpkin patch. Restored Reels
17
 Ruckus Bring the bedlam.
Ruckus' wastelander group, Chiara's Chums, has disbanded, leaving Ruckus alone to create his own solo thing. He is Ruckus the Rabbler!! and he is... kind of lonely, actually. 		Lil Dirty Dock
18
 Rust Shred the wasteland.
A Wastelander without a Wasteland is like a grain of sand without... um... a big pile of sand! Rust misses his home terribly, but he'll find a new place to belong. He's sure of it. 		Reclaimed Villa
19
 Shuri The genius Princess of Wakanda and current Black Panther.
Shuri is many things. Genius, Princess, vegan. The mantle that gives her the most pride, however, is that of Black Panther, protector of Wakanda. 		Bridge Station
20
 Triage Trooper No one is beyond saving.
Having barely escaped Saskia's grasp, Triage Trooper is trying his best to provide healing to those who are in need of his services. But can he escape the past that made Field Surgeon send Saskia looking for him in the first place? 		Zenith Wall
21
 War Machine Ace pilot, military veteran, and trusted ally of Tony Stark.
Rhodey, AKA War Machine, is a seasoned veteran that's seen his fair share of bad guys with massive egos. Doom is no different. He'll win as he always has, with cutting edge tech and a little luck. 		Forest Station

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Artemis Goddess of the moonlit hunt.
The patient goddess of the hunt has stayed behind on the Island after her the fall of Zeus, looking forward to testing her mettle in the new and dangerous wasteland. 		Mount Olympus
02
 Bravo Leader Take point.
Bravo Leader is a supply specialist with a heart of gold. On the edge of the wasteland, he keeps an eye on the marauders and seeks to protect the rest of the island. 		Ship It! Station
03
 Brite Raider Drive fast. Burn bright.
Brite Raider is making the best of a wrecked situation. Just because everything she's ever loved is now buried in several feet of sand doesn't mean that the future isn't brite! ...Right? 		Brite Raider's House
04
 Centurion Hazard Platoon's extraction expert and munitions master.
Centurion always thought he'd thrive in a wild wasteland. He was wrong. Everyone's always yelling, there's sand everywhere, and his sleep schedule's ALL out of whack! This place is rough. 		Piney Lane
05
 Cerberus Three fearless, ruthless, very good boys.
The gods may have fled after the fall of Zeus, but the three-headed guardian of the Grim Gate has stayed behind at his master's request. What - or who - could Hades be having Cerberus wait for? 		Grim Gate
06
 Chiara Guardian of the undiscovered wilds.
Chiara prefers to live a more passive life. The island usually solves its own problems. But Megalo Don and the marauders? Either they have to go, or she does. 		Grand Glacier
07
 Drakon Steel Rider Burn through the competition.
Few things are as incredible as the feeling of scorched wind as it blows across your face while you ride through the wasteland. Drakon Steel Rider is one of them. Are you ready to ride, or will you be left in the dust? 		Gas Station near Pleasant Piazza
08
 Hope Make some trouble. Change the world.
It's hard out here for a rebel. Hope knows that someone has to stand against Megalo Don, and that it's gotta be her. But something tells her that the influence of Pandora's Box isn't done with the Island... 		Sandy Steppes
09
 Joey Caliente Yearn for the burn, baby!
When it comes to island, there's always room for a little extra spice. Joey Caliente's ready to sauce and serve only the hottest takes around. Who knew hot could be so cool. 		Primo Pumps
10
 Nisha An honorable duelist in a dishonorable Society.
After the fall of The Society, Nisha has lost almost everything: her wealth, her family's land, her medallion. She's lost, unsure of what to do next... and perhaps, just needs a little hope. 		Lavish Lair
11
 Rust Shred the wasteland.
What's better than being a wastelander? NOTHING! Rust loves every bit of the chaos, the danger, and the nitro. And he'll do whatever it takes to protect it from Megalo Don's domination. 		Sandy Strip
12
 Oscar Nothing's gonna change his stripes.
After going into hiding after the fall of The Society, dignified bruiser Oscar has returned, and he's ready to claw back everything he's lost. Those in his way, beware. 		Classy Courts
13
 Peabody Phil, Earl and Axle. Three peas in a podcoat.
If your auto's been bodied, there's only one place to go: PEA BOIS! Phil, Earl, and Axle will put their three heads together and patch you up lickety-split. Trust your 4 wheels to these 3 peas! 		Pea Bois HQ
14
 Peelosopher Bananocrates The only true wisdom is knowing you are NaNa.
The Island's foremost Peelosopher, the wise and weary Bananocrates is happy to grant wisdom to those who seek it, and challenge those who think they've already figured it all out. 		Restored Reels
15
 Persephone The dreaded queen of the Underworld.
Regal queen of the Underworld Persephone has returned home after overseeing another successful spring. Don't let her sunny personality fool you - this dark queen would do anything for her beloved husband, their kingdom, and her dog. 		The Underworld
16
 Ruckus Bring the bedlam.
This wasteland is pretty sweet, huh? Ruckus likes it here. Cacti, Nitro, cars! Only thing Ruckus doesn't like is Megalo Don. Where can Ruckus find a REAL leader, huh? 		Lil Dirty Dock
17
 Saskia You don't want to be on her list.
When there's someone who needs finding, Saskia's the one to call. Her talents in tracking and secret-uncovering have made her the best of the best. The question is, who is she searching for now? 		The Cemetery
18
 T-60 Power Armor Courtesy of the Brotherhood of Steel.
The Brotherhood of Steel rose from the ashes of the Great War that ravaged the Earth. They are a knightly order dedicated to preserving and controlling all technology. 		Mesa Farm
19
 The Operator Take apart the competition.
There's plenty around that needs fixin', and not too many folks who got the tools or the know how. The Operator has both, with a helpin' of kind-heartedness to boot. 		Dumpenhausen
20
 The Underwriter Sorry, faulty glider deployment isn't covered by your policy.
This wasteland is getting pretty heated, and if there's one man to profit off of all this chaos, it's The Underwriter! No Sweat Insurance is happy to provide a policy that works for you. And you'd better stay paid up. After all, you wouldn't want to end up like the train... 		Beach Houses
21
 Triage Trooper No one is beyond saving.
Not everyone values a Support Specialist like Triage Trooper. Some might even consider him worthy of a bounty. But who would hunt down Triage Trooper? 		Rescue Station
22
 Vengeance Jones Iconic renegade on a mission for retribution.
Vengeance Jones has gotten his revenge. He's gotten a breather. And now, maybe he's starting to enjoy taking down villainous societies and vengeful gods. What's a wasteland warlord to the Jones of vengeance?? 		The Wreckmill
23
 Wasteland Dummy Made for the wasteland.
New wasteland, new Dummy! After putting in hard hours and a LOT of half-hearted labor for Peabody, the newly-minted Wastelander Dummy is ready to CRASH IT ALL! WOOHOO! 		Piney Pumps
24
 Wastelander Magneto Master of Magnetism, Leader of the Brotherhood of Mutants and one time friend to Charles Xavier.
Witness to the horrors of mankind, Magneto sees the potential inherent in mutantkind. Once he sought to make the world a better place for all mutants. Now... he just wants them to survive. 		Brawler's Battleground

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Artemis Goddess of the moonlit hunt.
Scout Specialist and a master of stealth and strategy, Artemis believes life is like an honorable hunt, and those who break the rules of the hunt can no longer be trusted. No matter how powerful they think they are. 		Lavish Lair
02
 Meowscles He's one swole cat.
Fresh from his cat-nap and ready for a stretch, Meowscles is ready to challenge Poseidon to an epic arm wrestle... but is he ready to wrestle with his past? 		Lil 'Villa
03
 Myna Fury flies on dark wings.
Scout Specialist. The gods have come to the Island. Zeus and his power. Hades and his legion. Artemis may seek honor in her hunt, but Myna seeks renown, and the gods provide excellent prey. 		Southeast of Rebel's Roost
04
 Laguna Storm the beach.
Medical Specialist with a heart of sandy gold. Laguna is ready with a bandage and orange slices if you need a break. 		Rescue Station
05
 Bravo Leader Take point.
Supply Specialist ready to help keep your ammo pockets full. Bravo Leader might be second to one, but to him, you're second to none. 		Snooty Steppes
06
 Poseidon Slurp-God of the sea. King of the beach.
Heavy Specialist. Why make war when you can make beach parties? Poseidon is the friendly face in the pantheon's crowd, ready with a lighthearted laugh and endless stories. 		Reckless Railways
07
 Medusa Humanity's stone-hearted defender.
Stories are whispered of the monstrous gorgon, slain by a great hero. That myth is a lie. The ruthless Medusa works tirelessly to avenge mortals wronged by the gods... and her work is never done. 		Fencing Fields
08
 Aphrodite Lead with your heart.
Medical Specialist. Aphrodite has spent countless eons saving mortals from wrathful gods, and the gods from each other. Zeus's current vendetta, however, has proven to be an exhausting challenge. 		Lovely Lodge
09
 Spartan Assassin One by one her enemies fall...
Supply Specialist. Spartan Assassin knows it isn't the weapon that makes the warrior, but the ammunition makes the weapon. 		Slumberyard
10
 Hope Make some trouble. Change the world.
After taking on The Society and winning, Hope just wants to celebrate... but, of course, now there's a whole pantheon of gods to worry about. When can a rebel with a dream get a break? 		Grand Glacier
11
 Khari A worthy hunter whose enchanted arrows never miss their mark.
Khari has rarely encountered her equal in hunting... so the arrival of Artemis, the Goddess of the Eternal Hunt, a pretty big deal for her! Is the formidable Khari too proud to ask for an autograph? 		Pantheon Path
12
 Clara Elegant and deadly.
Once The Society's most dangerous operative, the graceful and intense Clara is ready to start from scratch. After all, she didn't become the Island's pre-eminent mercenary without a flair for perfect execution. 		Coastal Columns
13
 Jittershock He's got a taste for gold. Literally.
Nothing is gonna get Jittershock down. The eclectic and electric hunter of gold, glitz, and tasty minerals is here to hunt down the most flavorful metals on the Island. And maybe a friend or two, too. 		Reclaimed Villa
14
 Etheria Twin-souled Elven warrior from beyond the Fallen Oasis.
Mytherious elven warrior Etheria has been seeking a place to rest for eons. As the sky of this Island trembles with the power of these newcomer gods, will she find rest, or further strife? 		House north of Restored Reels
15
 Charon Always pay the ferryman.
Charon has gotten really tired of the silent solitude of ferrying the dead to their final rest. With the Underworld's arrival on the Island, it might be time for this hard-working ferryman to retire... 		Cloistered Castle
16
 Noorah Protect your inner flame.
Mysterious storyteller Noorah collects myths and ancient tales as if they were priceless antiques. She is curious about the gods... but even more curious about the true nature of Pandora's Box. 		Central lake dock
17
 Peely Go bananas.
Freed from The Society's clutches, Peely has struck out on his own to find his destiny. He has an open heart, a tent, and a dream! Nothing's gonna get this 'nana down! Except maybe rain. Because he's in a tent. 		Camp south of Restored Reels
18
 Apollo The imperious god of the sun.
The god of the sun - and medicine, the arts, truth and prophecies, herds and shepherds... Apollo has no time for the squabbling of his fellow immortals, nor Zeus' vendetta against mortalkind, because he's a little busy for all that. 		Summit Temple
19
 Graveheart Chilling protector of the lost.
Do not be afraid. Graveheart may seem cold and hard-hearted, but this motherly statue is the warm, gentle guardian of the lost and the fallen. 		The Cemetery
20
 Anwar Burn with ancient knowledge.
Reclusive story-keeper Anwar protects ancient fables and myths from being lost to time. He knows all too well that there are those who try to shape stories to their will... like, for example, the gods. 		Dumpenhausen
21
 Lavendra A sweet tastemaker who knows all the buzz.
Nature is so beautiful, isn't it? And Lavendra is here to see ALL of it: every tree, every flower, every slavering Underworld wolf... okay, maybe nature is sometimes more intimidating than it is beautiful... 		Classy Courts
22
 Spirit Hunter Saeko Never let the spirits take hold.
With the arrival of The Underworld on the Island, the spirits are growing restless... and that is a headache for Spirit Hunter Saeko. Literally. Where's a good cup of herbal tea when you need one? 		Rebel's Roost
23
 Dummy Look out!
Thrillseeking daredevil Dummy is ready for the Crash Tour! What's the Crash Tour? It's a tradition! What kind of tradition? Definitely not the kind of tradition that Dummy just made up... 		Piney Pumps

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Sun Tan Specialist Don't get burned.
Medical Specialist. Hire Sun Tan Specialist if you need help staying alive. Especially out on the waves. 		Beach Houses
02
 Metal Mouth What lies beyond that sinister smile?
Heavy Specialist. Metal Mouth is a simple man. He sees a target, he shoots. 		The Cemetery
03
 Vengeance Jones Iconic renegade on a mission for retribution.
The Society's involvement in Peely's sudden disappearance has put them at the top of Jones' list. He knows they took his friend. The rescue mission is on! 		Underground HQ
04
 Hope Make some trouble. Change the world.
The idealistic founder of The Underground, Hope is on a mission to help Jones save his friend, as long as he's willing to support her fight against The Society... and her own sister, Valeria. 		Hazy Hillside Tunnel
05
 Snow Striker Master of snow and ice.
Scout Specialist. There are few things Snow Striker can't see. Like polka dots. 		Summit Base Camp
06
 Steelsight Victory demands nerves of steel.
Supply Specialist. Steelsight will reward you with some valuable ammo. If you've got the bars. 		Rebel's Roost
07
 Contract Giller Send in the fish.
Scout Specialist. Retirement was nice for Contract Giller. All you can eat fish food, a nice big tank, a treasure chest filled with bubbles. Then the Society showed up and 'dirtied the water'. It's time to clean the tank. 		Catcher's Cove
08
 Mecha Team Shadow Shadow assembly required.
Heavy Specialist. Mecha Team Shadow is immune to fire and is equipped with explosives. 		Riviera Station
09
 Boxy Ship out and send 'em packing.
Ready and reporting for duty! Boxy heard about the beef between The Society and the Underground, and she's here to help unpack the problem. 		The Other Other Windmill
10
 Leelah The bunny's got her back.
Leelah has come for one thing and one thing only. FRIENDS! She knows the Island isn't necessarily the best place to find them, but she has high hopes! 		Stormy Station
11
 Starr Oakley Hit your mark.
Crafty, clever, and careful, Starr Oakley's made a name for herself doing what she does best: putting on a show with her incredible archery trickshots. 		Lovely Lodge
12
 Dara Don't lose focus.
Medical Specialist. Dara lives by three rules: be prepared for everything, trust no one, and... well, she doesn't know what the third rule is yet, but she's prepared to figure it out. 		Lil 'Villa
13
 Silas Hesk Cold-blooded heir to a venomous dynasty.
The mysterious heir to the Hesk fortune is perhaps the last elite still defying The Society's reign. Silas Hesk is willing to quietly assist The Underground's efforts. Just don't ask about the snake. 		Sandy Strip
14
 Solid Snake A master of stealth, unrivaled in covert ops.
Scout Specialist. The man who makes the impossible possible, Solid Snake has plenty of experience saving the world from crisis time and time again. 		Piney Lane
15
 Snowheart Hard as stone. Cold as ice.
Nowhere is safer than the obscuring snow. Nothing is colder than the devouring blizzard. No one is more steadfast than the enduring Snowheart. When the storm clears, she remains. 		Zenith Wall
16
 Lana Llane The Island's Weapon-O-Matic mastermind.
Oh hey! You're probably wondering how I got here, huh? Well, it all started when...oh, you're just here for some items? Okay, well, I've still got you covered! 		Llama Farm
17
 Odyssey An ageless spirit of adventure.
Who is the enigmatic Odyssey, and why has she come to the Island just as The Society's fates have started to falter? She seeks answers about a mysterious mosaic, connected to ancient power... 		Ruined Reels
18
 Sonor Feel the echo. Create the beat.
From musical beats to seismic feats, Sonor has spent his life listening to the Island around him. Feeling the steady rhythms of an unsteady world. And that tempo? It's changing again. 		Slumberyard

  • C4S4
  • C4S3
  • C4S2
  • C4S1

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Nolan Chance Never bet against the mastermind.
WANTED: Nolan Chance (grand larceny, regular larceny, conspiracy to raise exotic supply llamas). Suspect is thought to be the mastermind behind the great Slap Vault Heist. Approach with caution. 		The Getaway
02
 Piper Pace Deliver the victory.
A lead-foot getaway driver with hand-to-hand-tossed fighting skills, Piper Pace is quick to deliver her team to safety after every heist. Just don't get in her way or you'll be in deep dish. 		Slappy Shores
03
 Fish Thicc Get schooled.
The jacked mackerel of safe-crackers, Fish Thicc brings the muscle to the heist crew's operations. He may rely on brute force, but deep down he's calm as a pond. 		Shore Shack
04
 Antonia Destructive by design.
Few know that the stylish weapons designer Antonia also moonlights as the mysterious master thief, Masque. Rumors say she's gathering a heist crew with Nolan Chance, despite their long-standing rivalry. 		The Getaway
05
 Khaby Lame Keep it simple.
From expert influencer to expert infiltrator, Khaby is the newest recruit to the heist team. Whether it's cracking safes or cracking heads, Khaby makes it look easy. 		Secluded Spire
06
 Meowscles He's one swole cat.
The purr-fect specimen of physical ability and adorability. No matter how much trouble he finds himself in, Meowscles always lands on his feet. 		Replaced
07
 Love Ranger Aim for the heart.
Stone-cold sharpshooter Love Ranger has seen prophecy of an oncoming darkness, and has set aside his mission of devotion to warn others of the coming SPOOKY nights... if they will listen... 		Replaced
08
 Renegade Shadow Step out of the shadows and stake your claim.
The former lone agent is now an experienced heist crew leader, on the hunt for a new score. The Eclipse Hotel is a promising target, if he can find a crew willing to tackle its elaborate defenses. 		Shattered Slabs
09
 Agent Peely He's got a license to peel.
His name? Agent Peely. His codename? 84N4N4. His mission? Uh... Um... He'll get back to you on that. Actually, wait, no. It's top secret. Yeah, totally confidential. So, uh, don't worry about it okay? 		Replaced
10
 Arctic Assassin Stay frosty.
People say Arctic Assassin is cold-hearted and cold-blooded. But she's warm as a sunny day and twice as nice! With her rep on thin ice, she just wants to stop new friends from getting cold feet... 		The Hall of Whispers
11
 Diamond Diva Synthetic diamonds need not apply.
Diamond Diva has embraced her new career as a heist expert, not just to retain her luxe lifestyle, but as a calling. After all, high pressure is what makes a diamond, and she's ready to shine. 		MEGA City
12
 Countess Daraku Embrace your thirst for fame.
International rock star Countess Daraku has a big secret: she's an ancient, cunning vampire who loves to play with her prey. And her next targets: her own mega-fans, The High Stakes Club... 		Eastern Watch
13
 Bull Shark Mess with the bull, you get the shark.
Scout Specialist. Hire Bull Shark if you want a sniper who marks targets. 		Creeky Compound
14
 Royale Bomber Searching for a target-rich environment.
Supply Specialist. When hired, Royale Bomber supplies you with ammo. 		Brutal Bastion
15
 Beastmode Gassed up and ready to roar.
Heavy Specialist. Beastmode is immune to fire and loves explosions. 		Breakwater Bay
16
 Sun Strider It's all fun in the sun.
Medical Specialist. Hire Sun Strider if you need healing and revival. 		Eclipsed Estate
17
 Joni the Scarlet Tactician. Survivor. Starter of the party.
The intense leader of The High Stakes Club is dressed up for an awesome concert, as Joni the Scarlet. She's always been a mega-fan of rockstar Countess Daraku, so how will she handle learning that her idol is secretly a villanous vampire? 		Kenjutsu Crossing
18
 Fishstick Keep far away from Maki Master.
A self-proclaimed expert in the "aquatic arts", Fishstick has been keeping a close eye on the villainous Kado Thorne. Although Thorne's newest hot spots look enticing, Fishstick isn't about to fall for his treacheous, hypnotic lure. 		Replaced
19
 Shimmerdusk No quarry can escape her... in any reality.
The dark fae huntress Shimmerdusk, a monster hunter of great renown, has tracked Kado Thorne across time and space to this Island. But she will need all her wits to secure her showdown... 		Windcatch Lake
20
 Phaedra A dark sea witch with unknowable power.
In pursuit of strengthening her sea witchcraft, Phaedra's left the shore to find new magic lurking in jungle shadow... And she's kinda seasick. Which is what she calls being homesick for the sea. 		The Apparatus
21
 Mae Impulsive hacker with an explosive sense of humor.
Hi~ I'm Mae! I do codebreaking and combustibles >:D I've been kicked out of MANY hackathons and chemistry classes UwU but I think they're just jealous ;) Need help? Stop by my Deboot van! ^_^ 		Mesa's Reach
22
 Victoria Saint Vampire-hunter of the Old West.
In her quest to take down Countess Daraku, this lone stake-slinger has gained unexpected mentees: the High Stakes Club. Victoria's not usually a pack hunter, but... Maybe a little change is good. 		Woodsy Ward
23
 Agent Jones Look sharp, we're saving reality.
Agent Jones has just landed back on the Island, and he's... still catching up a bit. He's reluctantly signed on to help his former nemesis, Dr. Slone, with her mysterious plan... if he can trust her. 		Frenzy Fields
24
 Mincemeat Made with love. And meat.
Pie... Pie... PIE! Mincemeat love mince... Mincemeat love meat also? Yes... YES.... MINCEMEAT IS PIE. STRONG, DELICIOUS PIE. Looper love Mincemeat? 		Southern Ruin
25
 Heartbreak Ranger A dark passion burns.
Burning warrior Heartbreak Ranger has arrived on the Island, just as prophesized. But is this champion of the flickering flame here to banish the dark, or rule it? 		Rumble Ruins
26
 Phantom Meowscles A purrnicious monster from a cursed shadow realm.
Everyone in this sunlit world takes everything so seriously. Nothing matters except tricks and treats. Phantom Meowscles is here to teach everyone a lesson in mischief. 		Unnamed Frog Statue #5
27
 Bogstick Lurk the murky mire.
in the bog there lived a fish. in the fish there lived a bog. the fish and the bog were always together. where does the fish end and the bog begin? the bog knows. the bog knows all. 		Sunswoon Lagoon
28
 Peely Bone He's probably going to be fine.
Peely Bone may look spooky, but on the inside he's just a sweet nanner trying to do the best with what he's got. He's just as appeeling as the other Peelys, only, uh... More... Transparent? 		Whispering Waters

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Fennix Never outfoxed.
The brooding commander of the Fur Force, Fennix has no patience for nonsense, tricks, or schemes. Especially where his reckless brother Volpez is concerned. 		Royal Ruin
02
 Volpez The sly, wild leader of the Winter Tricksters.
The leader of the rebellious Winter Tricksters, Volpez is all about using mischief and mayhem to outwit enemies of the Island... and his stick-in-the-mud brother Fennix, too. 		The Hall of Whispers
03
 Innovator Slone A resilient genius, ready for a reinvention.
After surviving a crushing conflict, Slone found herself in a long-abandoned jungle, where she has been recovering ever since. She has a plan... but can she be trusted? 		North of Southern Ruin
04
 Aura Get the goods in style.
Aura's using her expert treasure-hunting skills to track down the Chalice of Cubetastrophe, a gilded goblet whose dark energy threatens to destroy the rainforest. But who put it there? And why? 		Hitches and Ditches
05
 Nia A self-taught expert in stealth and style.
Hired to investigate the explorers of the jungle, stealth expert Nia isn't afraid of a challenge. But without knowing the identity of her client, she's not quite sure what she's looking for... 		South of Steamy Springs
06
 Guardian Amara Protector of the Island's ancient temples.
Temple guardian Amara has reluctantly agreed to work alongside the explorers to study the mysterious jungle. What secrets does she seek among the ancient ruins? 		Brutal Bastion
07
 Trace Wander no more.
Psionic nomad Trace has seen countless places, but made a home in MEGA City. What is this Luminary mind hoping to discover alongside the explorers? 		The Apparatus
08
 Peely Go bananas.
Peely's bravely traversed the Wilds to find the storied statue of Potassius Peels. Why not buy one of Peely's bananas to enjoy in the long shadow of history's most beloved nana general? 		Peely Statue near Shady Stilts
09
 Purradise Meowscles From the catwalk to the boardwalk.
Purradise Meowscles is feline fine! The Island's latest cat-astrophe is basically ancient hiss-tory, and this swole cat is happy to spend some time cat nappin', beach pawtyin', and plain ol' kitten around. 		Sunswoon Lagoon
10
 Remedy Take your medicine.
Medical Specialist. Hire Remedy if you need healing and revival. 		Frenzy Fields
11
 Triage Trooper No one is beyond saving.
Medical Specialist. Hire Triage Trooper if you need healing and revival. 		Slappy Shores
12
 Kitbash Show 'em what you're made of.
Heavy Specialist. Kitbash is immune to fire and loves explosions. 		Breakwater Bay
13
 Beastmode Gassed up and ready to roar.
Heavy Specialist. Beastmode is immune to fire and loves explosions. 		Drift Ridge
14
 Insight Target in sight.
Scout Specialist. Hire Insight if you want a sniper who marks targets. 		Rumble Ruins
15
 Longshot No target is out of range.
Scout Specialist. Hire Longshot if you want a sniper who marks targets. 		Eastern Watch
16
 Munitions Expert Rare munitions expert.
Supply Specialist. When hired, Munitions Expert supplies you with ammo. 		Fallow Fuel
17
 Triggerfish Stick it to 'em.
The coral buddies are missing, and Triggerfish will stop at nothing to find them. This highly-trained, battle-elite combat fish is unflappable, unfloppable, and unstoppable. 		Seaside Sentry
18
 Bryne A genuine Atlantean princess.
Princess Bryne is the ocean's most beloved ruler. But when her citizens are threatened, Bryne is ready to swim into action and save crustaceans and invertebrates of all shape, size, and scale. 		Burning Beacon
19
 Turk Hook your prey.
It's been a tough trawling season for this fisherman-for-hire. The fish just aren't bitin' like they used to... But Turk has a coral companion-inspired plan to get his books back in the black. 		Berg Barge
20
 Riptide Hook your prey.
After a lifetime of fishin' and trawlin', Riptide is always ready to cause trouble for the residents of the sea. And the second things go sour, he'll laugh and be off like a ship in the night... 		Berg Barge
21
 Stingray Beware the silent sting of doom.
The menace from the deepest depths... The tidal wave that unfloats your boat... The pernicious puddle that splashes back... Stingray is a nautical nuisance draped in a net, and you should be very afraid. 		Lonely Labyrinth
22
 Era Beware the silent sting of doom.
Era, like every Era before her, has sworn to protect the island. By studying her ancestors' memories, she hopes to help the explorers understand the mysteries of Rumble Ruins. 		Shady Stilts
23
 Princess Lexa No sword nor crown will keep her from her destiny.
Sick of waiting for a grand destiny to find her, Princess Lexa of the ageless kingdom has decided to track it down herself. Leaving behind the stuffy life of royalty, she's ready for a true adventure. 		The Citadel
24
 Bushranger He's one scrappy little tree.
It's a jungle out there, but Bushy's bashful. Last time he made a new treefriend, it didn't go so well. Before he talks to the new trees in town, he'll need a plan to leaf them with a good impression. 		Campsite near Rowdy Acres
25
 Garrison Hold down the fort.
Supply Specialist. When hired, Garrison supplies you with ammo. 		Watery Watch

Image Name Biography Location
01
 CRZ-8 Hiding in the city's darkest pockets.
A clean break means a clean getaway. Cue CRZ-8, who's ready to change the game in Mega City. 		Removed
02
 Evie Criminal. Vigilante. And the Peace Syndicate's secret weapon.
[[SECURE PEACE SYNDICATE MESSAGE INTERCEPTED]] The Syndicates are on the brink of war. Are you sure this hero can help, Evie? - X 		Knotty Nets
03
 Garrison Hold down the fort.
Supply Specialist. When hired, Garrison supplies you with ammo. 		Watery Watch
04
 Longshot No target is out of range.
Scout Specialist. Hire Longshot if you want a sniper who marks targets. 		Royal Ruin
05
 Mizuki The depth of the ocean. The rage of the storm.
Reserved Empress Mizuki of the elusive River Guard lives by the clan's ideals: flow like water, cut like ice. But can she keep her cool once her defiant brother Stray returns to the city? 		Eastern Watch
06
 P33LY Nana-Nana's Banana Assassin.
Built using the latest in nana-technology. Advanced programming ensures P33LY won't be caught slipping. 		Pleasant Passage
07
 Polar Patroller Don't poke the bear.
Heavy Specialist. Polar Patroller is immune to fire and loves explosions. 		Icy Islets
08
 Remedy Take your medicine.
Medical Specialist. Hire Remedy if you need healing and revival. 		Secluded Spire
09
 Stray Adrift, but never lost.
Restless wanderer Stray left his home to join the Fox Clan as their Special Ops expert. As tensions grow between the Syndicates, is he ready to face his sister, the regal Empress Mizuki? 		MEGA City
10
 Sunflower Certified organic.
Now that her leadership of the farm is undisputed, Sunflower has a few ideas to take it to the next level. Some very... interesting... ideas. 		Frenzy Fields
11
 Thunder Street warrior, sushi chef, and the coolest lizard in the Peace Syndicate.
[[SECURE PEACE SYNDICATE MESSAGE INTERCEPTED]] You're our most-trusted lieutenant, Thunder. Keep an eye on Evie, protect the city, and Keep the Peace.- X 		Lotus Lookout
12
 Triage Trooper No one is beyond saving.
Medical Specialist. Hire Triage Trooper if you need healing and revival. 		Crusty Crates
13
 Sludge Drippy and dangerous.
Heavy Specialist. Sludge is immune to fire and loves explosions. 		Steamy Springs
14
 Munitions Expert Rare munitions expert.
Supply Specialist. When hired, Munitions Expert supplies you with ammo. 		Breakwater Bay
15
 Insight Target in sight.
Scout Specialist. Hire Insight if you want a sniper who marks targets. 		Cold Cavern
16
 Mystica Fabled survivor. Luminary mind.
As the founder of tech-based syndicate The Luminaries, mysterious explorer-inventor Mystica has made a new home in MEGA City... and will do anything to protect it. 		Shattered Slabs
17
 Imani Embrace the past. Create the future.
Independent artist Imani is a solo visionary in a city full of syndicates. What can her unique perspective reveal about MEGA City... and the Island itself? 		North of The Autumnwood
18
 Renzo the Destroyer The galaxy's premier doomfluencer.
Master of Misery! Baron of Bitterness! Viscount of Very Bad! Renzo is MEGA City's top doomfluencer, serving destruction with rococo baroque flair. Are you ready for Cataclysm 2.0? 		Brutal Bastion
19
 Highwire Chaos is a game, and she always wins.
The de facto leader of the mysterious Unseen syndicate, Highwire loves nothing more than making the city go a little haywire. But there are limits to her craving chaos? 		Kenjutsu Crossing
20
 Spider-Gwen All right, people, let's start at the beginning one last time.
Miles Morales may be missing, but Spider-Gwen won't give up the search. She's determined to find her friend... no matter where he's ended up in the Spider-verse. 		Slappy Shores

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Aura Get the goods in style.
Treasure hunter Aura has always focused her career on ancient tombs, sunken temples, lost islands... Is Wild Card's newest recruit ready for the world of high stakes heists? 		Crude Harbor
02
 Evie Criminal. Vigilante. And the Peace Syndicate's secret weapon.
[SECURE PEACE SYNDICATE MESSAGE INTERCEPTED] If your report is correct, Evie... There's no time for Plan A. You have clearance to improvise. - X 		Shore Shack
03
 Frozen Fishstick Show 'em how fresh frozen can be.
With his glacial kingdom fused to the new Island, Frozen Fishstick is charting this new world in the name of his queen. If only he could remember his name. Or anything else. 		Icy Islets
04
 Frozen Red Knight Frozen menace of icy tundra.
The menace of the icy wastes, Frozen Red Knight has taken down kingdoms with her chaotic machinations. Now on the Island, she's setting her cold gaze on the Oathbound... 		Brutal Bastion
05
 Omega Knight There can only be one knight.
There is no warrior in any reality that can match Omega Knight's strength and ferocity. And he will fight the leader of the Oathbound over, and over... and over... to prove it! 		Secluded Spire
06
 Princess Felicity Fish First of her name. Long may she reign.
Princess Felicity Fish has found herself in a new kingdom, which means a possible royal alliance. But can the wayward princess impress the Oathbound's mysterious leader? 		West of The Citadel
07
 Raptorian The Brave Long may his banner fly.
Now in a new kingdom, Raptorian the Brave has reluctantly sworn himself to the Oathbound. After all, what's a knight without a kindgom? Even one that's a little too... perfect. 		Pleasant Passage
08
 Neymar Jr Boldness is my nickname.
From the soccer field to the battlefield, Neymar Jr. always gives it his all. As Fortnite FC's star player, he plans to take the team all the way to the finals. 		Slappy Shores
09
 Scrapknight Jules A good build is worth the effort.
The tech on this new island is intriguing, and Scrapknight Jules is willing to work with anyone who can teach her about it... even the Oathbound and their mysterious Rift Warden. 		Faulty Splits
10
 Helsie Adventure-seeker. Vampire staker. Boba master.
Sweet, bubbly Helsie may not look fearsome, but this member of teenage vampire hunters The High Stakes Club is more dangerous than she seems. 		Hidden Henge
11
 Joni the Red Tactician. Survivor. Defender of the innocent.
As the intense leader of teenage vampire hunters The High Stakes Club, Joni the Red is a force to be reckoned with. Rumor has it that she'll do anything to protect a friend. 		Faulty Splits
12
 Snowheart Hard as stone. Cold as ice.
The rebel queen of the icy wastes, Snowheart has a burning need to freeze all worlds, and has set her operatives the task of conquering this new realm in her name. 		Cold Cavern
13
 Sunflower Certified organic.
Sunflower is spreading the message that the farm is her domain, and trying to keep that pesky Farmer Steel from laying claim to what is rightfully hers. 		Frenzy Fields
14
 Surrr Burger The Spatulady of the Lake's favored knight.
The Knights of the Food Court seek a home worthy of their order. Though it lacks mayo rivers and tomato mountains, Surrr Burger thinks this new island is a candidate. 		Anvil Square
15
 Wild Card Pick a card, any card.
Wild Card is the island's foremost heist expert, and he's gathering a crew for a big job. But does he have an ace up his sleeve, or are his grand plans a classic bluff? 		Breakwater Bay
Shattered Slabs
Royal Ruin
16
 Diamond Diva Synthetic diamonds need not apply.
Living in luxury is expensive, and even a glamorous socialite like Diamond Diva needs to refill her coffers. But is this crown jewel ready to commit to Wild Card's big heist? 		Meadow Mansion
17
 Renegade Shadow Step out of the shadows and stake your claim.
After a stretch of being a lone agent, Renegade Shadow is looking for a new score. And he may have found one... if he's not afraid of getting in Wild Card's way. 		Woodsy Ward
18
 Rebel Oppose the establishment.
Robotic rabble rouser Rebel always roots for the underdog. With a heist and an inter-crew faceoff coming, will she pick a side, or watch from the sidelines? 		The Hall of Whispers

  • C3S4
  • C3S3
  • C3S2
  • C3S1

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Bao Bros Steamed up and ready for action.
Always looking for exciting flavor combinations, Bao Bros is considering a bold new Chrome-filled dumpling. It’s sure to be more popular than their chocolate-and-Chug buns. 		The Glow Vault
02
 Beach Bomber Make the beach party brite!
Beach Bomber is now a successful small business owner! Just in time for everything to get covered by Chrome. Hey friend, you looking to buy a VERY profitable ice cream shop? 		Coney Crossroads
03
 Blackheart The dreaded captain of the stormy seas.
Blackheart will never give up his search for treasure. Who knows? Maybe the real treasure was the friends we made along the way. Just kidding. It’s gold and jewels. 		The Driftwood
04
 Bunker Jonesy Debunk'd.
Bunker Jonesy's survived a lot. Now, his greatest challenge yet: roommates! If you thought his conspiracy board was hard to follow, you should see his take on a chore wheel. 		Fort Jonesy
05
 Castaway Jonesy He's not lost, okay?
Castaway Jonesy is not used to having roommates. They're so tetchy! So what if there's sand all over the floor? And the couch. And, uh, in the fridge. Okay, that one might be bad. 		Fort Jonesy
06
 Cryptic Master of mystery.
When asked to provide a bio, Cryptic stared intensely, narrowed his eyes, and shook his head. Maybe he’s still upset about losing his expensive relic collection? 		Rave Cave
07
 Evie Criminal. Vigilante. And the Peace Syndicate's secret weapon.
[SECURE PEACE SYNDICATE MESSAGE INTERCEPTED] You’re doing well, Evie. It’s almost time to move to the next phase. Twyn is en route to assist - X 		Syndicate Shoals
08
 Fishstick Keep far away from Maki Master.
It’s time for fishstick to don his ancient armor and help protect the island! If he had his armor. Or any armor. Anyone know how to forge Atlantean steel on a restaurant griddle? 		Sleepy Sound
09
 Guaco Stay crunchy, Guaco's comin...
Guaco sometimes thinks about moving on from Greasy Grove. Exploring the island. Searching for his calling. But a customer comes in, interrupts his train of thought, and it’s back to filling taco shells. 		Greasy Grove
10
 Jonesy The First Never forget your first run.
Jonesy the First is the number one Jonesy. You know it, he knows it, everyone knows it. So can somebody tell these other Joneses who's boss? And to stop eating his yogurt? 		Fort Jonesy
11
 Kit Proudly following in his father's pawprints.
Kit’s a genius at building mechs and fighting evil. So why not add therapist to his resume? He’ll get Meowscles and Lynx to reconnect, if he has to put them in time out to do it. 		Scratch Pad
12
 Kyle Friend of the trees. Most of them, anyway.
The island’s favorite lumberjack is concerned about this ‘Chrome’ stuff. These kids with their fancy-schmancy living metal. What happened to good old traditional wood? Hmph. 		Chop Shop
13
 Mancake Forged on a griddle of rage.
Mancake finds himself a long way from Butter Barn. While he misses the familiar environs, he’s happy to have a break from hearing that song on endless loop. 		Rocky Reels
14
 Maximilian Pilot your way to victory.
To the sky! Ace pilot Maximilian has always felt free among the clouds. In fact, he’s picked up some contract work for No Sweat Insurance brining people to safety above the island. 		Maximillian's Scrap Pavilion
14
 Meowscles He's one swole cat.
Meowscles is very strong, but not great at expressing his feelings. Will Kit's playlist of 20-second videos by 'SelfHelpCalicoPHD' help Meowscles reconnect with his old friend Lynx? 		Reality Falls
15
 Panther An IO agent tasked with infiltrating The Seven.
The IO is gone and now this top agent finds herself in hostile territory without allies and without a mission. She's glad she got to keep the helmet though. 		Central GAS Station
16
 Relaxed Fit Jonesy Victory or whatever else you've got, he's not picky.
It’s time for all of us to set conflict aside and work together. And yes, that means not calling Relaxed Fit Jonesy out on his… “relaxed” tidying standards. There’s an island to save! 		Fort Jonesy
17
 Rustler Scuff up your boots.
Hey there, varmint! Git a wiggle on, because Rustler wants your help making sure the island’s animals are in apple pie order. Not really sure what that means, but good luck. 		Shifty Shafts
18
 Sabina Her bridges are burned, there's no turning back.
Sabina has realized you can’t clean up the island if you’re knee deep in dirt. So she’s pivoted to selling secrets. Not “rumors,” per se, but she makes no guarantees. 		Shell or High Water
19
 Stash'd No one said being fresh was easy.
Stash'd has officially joined forces with the secretive Peace Syndicate. Their mission on the Island is still unclear… But whatever they’re up to, they’re gonna need a getaway driver. 		Chonker’s Speedway
20
 Sunbird Fly in light, and eclipse the sun.
Sunbird had dedicated her life to mapping the stars in the heavens above. It is only recently that she has realized: there are fewer stars, now, than when she started… 		The Temple
21
 The Underwriter Sorry, faulty glider deployment isn't covered by your policy.
The Underwriter has huge concerns about the sudden appearance of Chrome. Namely, he wants to find a way to avoid any and all insurance payouts due to its presence on the island. 		No Sweat Insurance
22
 Meow Skulls She's one chill kitty.
Meow Skulls knows she's awesome. When you've got nine lives, it's okay if you take a little time figuring out what the future holds, right? 		Rave Cave
23
 Chrome Punk Hacking and carving a path to victory.
Chrome Punk is a renowned pioneer in the underground "gourd-core" music scene. His attitude is unmatched except by his brother, Punk, with whom he had a falling out. 		Flutter Barn
24
 Agent Jones Look sharp, we're saving reality.
With the Seven missing, someone's gotta save the Island. Jones is up for the task - with a little help from the Scientist's "energetic" AI. So look sharp, we're saving reality... again. 		Fort Jonesy
25
 Bushranger He's one scrappy little tree.
Greetingsgreetins, friend person! Island is full of shinybad and scarydark. But Bushranger is ready to help! Bushie just needs a little nap first. Just a tiny little nap. 		Southwest of the Reality Tree

Image Name Biography Location
02
 Rustler Scuff up your boots.
Saddle up, pardner! Rustler's the finest livestock wrangler Steel Farm has ever seen, and she's lending her beast-rasslin' abilities to help you tame the Island's wildlife. 		Shifty Shafts
03
 The Paradigm Her allegiance is unknown. One of The Seven.
Welcomed back into the Seven after a long, painful exile, Paradigm is focused on reconnecting with her teammates, and rediscovering her passion for building cool tech. 		Removed
04
 The Scientist His mission is unknown. One of The Seven.
Things are peaceful. In the Scientist's opinion, maybe a little TOO peaceful. He's just gonna double-check his Zero Point physics calculations real quick. Don't worry about it. 		Removed
05
 The Origin His reality lives on. One of the Seven.
What does a decorated field general do in times of peace? The Origin isn't really sure. He'll keep patrolling until he figures it out. 		Removed
07
 Sunbird Fly in light, and eclipse the sun.
An astronomer for the ages, Sunbird has arrived on the Island determined to continue her complete mapping of the stars in the universe. It'll take a while. There's a lot of them. 		The Temple
08
 Guaco Stay crunchy, Guaco's comin...
Guaco's rebuilding TACOS from the shell up, better than ever before. The guac is chunky, the carne asada is premium, and the new drink machine has 57 flavors. 		Greasy Grove
09
 Mancake Forged on a griddle of rage.
Teamin' up was fun, but Mancake reckons it's time to return to his lone wanderer days. Just him, Josie, and the open road, sticky with the sweet maple syrup of possibility. 		Rocky Reels
10
 Bao Bros Steamed up and ready for action.
Regarded as a hero amongst the Loopers, business is booming for Bao Bros. Stop by and try Condo Canyon's new favorite restaurant! 		Condo Canyon
12
 Cuddle Team Leader Hug it out.
Cuddle Team Leader has been many things to many people. Best Friend. Soldier. Team Leader. These days she fancies herself a roller coaster designer. You ready to strap in? 		Rave Cave
13
 Stash'd No one said being fresh was easy.
Nobody drives a getaway car like Stash'd. Currently he's more like a really, really fast chauffeur, but he knows cars, and he's got the gear to prove it. 		Chonker's Speedway
14
 Haven Raised by the Island. Born to defend it.
This is not the Island Haven remembers. The natural world feels out of sync. None of the plants or animals look the same. And why have the klombos left? 		Loot Lake
15
 Jonesy The First Never forget your first run.
The battle may be over, but Jonesy's still the First. And as the First, he's leading the Loopers in... Uh... In something. He'll find his thing. Maybe gymnastics? No... 		The Joneses
16
 Ludwig Best of the wurst.
Ludwig's developed a taste for combat just in time for the greatest battle of his lifetime to end. Now he'll fight anyone... except the Brat. There's no sense in spoiling good sausage. 		The Joneses
17
 Bunker Jonesy Debunk'd.
Bunker Jonesy's a survivalist now. If he can make a camp out of sticks, shoes out of bark, and a fishing rod out of one very shiny button, he'll never get trapped in a bunker again. 		The Joneses
18
 Mullet Marauder Totally. Totally radical.
Mullet Marauder is finally, FINALLY throwing himself into making his dream come true. That's right: you're looking at the star of Island's next big celebrity workout tape. 		The Joneses
19
 Metal Team Leader Totally metal.
It is time for Metal Team Leader to understand peace. Embrace tranquility. Experience the serene stillness of quietly rusting by the seaside. 		Shroom Chalet
20
 Cuddlepool Ferociously furry.
All of this talk of peace makes Cuddlepool feel itchy. What's a rude Super Hero bear to do without a villain to fight or a war to win? She'll have to start setting cars on fire or something. 		Shroom Chalet
21
 Quackling Quack in action.
Quackling's planning a fabulous trip around the Island. Can't you picture it, ducky? Wind in your feathers! Sun on your beak! The ocean tickling your scaly webbed toes! 		Shroom Chalet
22
 Kyle Friend of the trees. Most of them, anyway.
The Island's favorite lumberjack is ready to help with rebuilding efforts. He's excited to use all of these new exotic trees, so get ready for a LOT of weird rocking chairs. 		Logjam Lumberyard
23
 Cryptic Master of mystery.
Cryptic is a collector, of sorts. He's interested in your curios, relics, artifacts, and collectables, especially if they're imbued with dark magic. Uh, I mean, regular magic. 		Rave Cave
24
 Fishstick Keep far away from Maki Master.
The greatest Atlantean warrior is here to defeat the IO! Sure, he's extremely late. Some may say he missed the whole battle. In fact, everyone would say that except Fishstick. 		Sleepy Sound
26
 Meowscles He's one swole cat.
Meowscles put his life purrsuits on paws to practice speaking. He's a bit self-clawnscious about his promeowcination and vocatbulary, but he's learning a litter bit more each day. 		Reality Falls
28
 Evie Criminal. Vigilante. And the Peace Syndicate's secret weapon.
Evie is the Peace Syndicate's secret weapon. Allegedly she's here to help the Island rebuild after the Imagined Order's defeat, but the Syndicate rarely acts altruistically. 		Syndicate Shoals
29
 Panther An IO agent tasked with infiltrating The Seven.
Technically, Panther's mission to infiltrate the Seven is going pretty well. Sure, the Imagined Order isn't around to do anything about it... But you have to celebrate the small wins. 		Central GAS Station
30
 The Underwriter Sorry, faulty glider deployment isn't covered by your policy.
The Underwriter is prepared to help you with all your insurance needs. You have insurance needs, don't you? If you don't, he'll make sure you do in no time. 		Tilted Towers
31
 Beach Bomber Make the beach party brite!
Beach Bomber loves skateboarding, sunny days, and long walks on the beach. She also can't believe that Lil' Whip never once cleaned the shake machine. Ew. Gross. 		Coney Crossroads
32
 Blackheart The dreaded captain of the stormy seas.
Y'arrr! The most feared pirate captain this side of Sanctuary has landed at port... And he's not setting sail until he finds the treasure he's looking for. 		Lazy Lagoon
33
 Sabina Her bridges are burned, there's no turning back.
Sabina was raised for a life of luxury... And intense corruption, a requirement to keep up her family's estate. She cast it all aside for a more honest vocation: assassin for hire. 		Shell or High Water

Image Name Biography Location
01
 The Origin His reality lives on. One of the Seven.
The Seven's field general and war tactician has a complicated past littered with betrayal. It may take time for him to warm up to you... 		Sanctuary
02
 The Imagined Her past is the key to our future. One of The Seven.
The Imagined may be a member of the Seven, but does things her way, on her schedule, with or without the Origin's permission. You'll help her, right? 		Seven Outpost IV
03
 The Visitor Intentions unknown. One of The Seven.
The Seven's official navigator has seen war before. But even the worst conflict he's ever seen will pale in comparison to what's coming. 		Launchpad
04
 The Scientist His mission is unknown. One of The Seven.
He's an engineer, a timeless style maven, and a celebrated writer of his own bios. But no accomplishment will feel better than his next to-do list entry: bringing the Paradigm home. 		Synapse Station
05
 Agent Jones Look sharp, we're saving reality.
Agent Jones is ready to unite the Seven, take down the Imagined Order, and make good on his promise to find Geno. Whoa, that's... Uh, that's a lot. But he's ready for it! 		Seven Outposts
06
 The Foundation His mission is Everything. Leader of The Seven.
The Foundation never struggled with leading the Seven... until the war for reality broke out. Now he's faced with a vital question: In the heat of battle, who can he trust? 		Sanctuary
07
 Bunker Jonesy Debunk'd.
Bunker Jonesy may have accepted the reality of the current situation, but it doesn't mean he has to like it. He prefers his wars shadowy secret, and vague, thank you very much. 		The Joneses
08
 Ludwig Best of the wurst.
As war consumes the Island, Ludwig's taken it upon himself to be the official troop morale booster. So far, his military merrymaking has been described as "successful-ish." 		The Joneses
09
 Brainiac Victory takes braaaains.
Brainiac has finally done it. He's consumed all the brains he needs to temporarily restore his zombified mind. But how long will his lucidity last? 		The Joneses
10
 Mullet Marauder Totally. Totally radical.
Dude. DUDE. DUUUUDE. This war is NOT as tubular as my secret BFF the Foundation made it out to be. You know him, right? The Foundation? My big rad bro with the far-out hat? 		The Joneses
11
 Jonesy The First Never forget your first run.
The threat of war puts Jonesy the First right in his element. An expert at combat, building, and weapons management, this battle-hardened OG is going straight to the front lines. 		The Joneses
12
 Cuddle Team Leader Hug it out.
War is here, and Cuddle Team Leader can hardly bear it. She's rallied the Island's cuddliest troops to protect fuzzy pink bears everywhere. 		Camp Cuddle
13
 Metal Team Leader Totally metal.
Metal Team Leader has learned a lot from the flesh-beings around her. She has a few followups, though: What is fear? What is sadness? And why are Shield Potions served hot? 		Camp Cuddle
14
 Cuddlepool Ferociously furry.
Cuddlepool's no expert, but she's definitely getting the vibe that this war might be bad news. Though... Those tanks look pretty fun to drive... Maybe it's not all bad! 		Camp Cuddle
15
 Quackling Quack in action.
All-out war can't dampen this fabulous fowl's spirits! Quackling's calling has always been making the best of a truly soggy situation. Not even impending doom will stop her. 		Camp Cuddle
16
 Guaco Stay crunchy, Guaco's comin...
Guaco is the undisputed leader of the Seven-aligned Foodie Battalion. Because when the war horn blows your order number, you jump into the firing range, and out of the fryer. 		Greasy Grove
17
 Lil' Whip Whipped up, and ready to serve.
Howdy-hoody, sweetie! Things are getting a little sticky out there, but Lil' Whip is here to sprinkle some sweetness on the war for the fate of reality! 		Coney Crossroads
18
 Bao Bros Steamed up and ready for action.
Looking for the Foodie Battalion's tactician supreme? That's Bao Bros. His smart, fearless military mind is an asset on any battle map. The Origin is his personal hero. 		Condo Canyon
19
 Tomatohead Extra saucy.
When he's not hosting pizza parties for soldiers on the front lines, Tomatohead helps Guaco keep the Foodie Battalion in line... Mostly using the promise of more pizza parties. 		Disappeared
20
 Doctor Strange Sorcerer Supreme and Master of the Mystic Arts.
The Master of the Mystic Arts is here to defend reality, no matter the cost. But will this sorcerer's magic be enough to save the Island? 		The Daily Bugle
21
 Mancake Forged on a griddle of rage.
Once a bank-robbin' outlaw collectin' stacks on stacks, Mancake's squadding up with the other food folks to form a balanced breakfast. 		Butter Barn
22
 Peely Go bananas!
Something came over Peely when war broke out across the Island. A potassium-rich passion to learn an ap-peeling new skill. The time is ripe for Peely... to learn how to drive. 		Crashed bus near Coney Crossroads
23
 Gunnar Decorated and feared enforcer of the Imagined Order's command.
The Imagined Order's highest-ranking enforcer can terrify his enemies with just a look. He is very serious about his surprisingly large chainsaw collection. 		Command Cavern
24
 Huntmaster Saber Feared, fanged, and ruthless.
Many people believed Huntmaster Saber was a legend... until he emerged and aligned himself with the Imagined Order. His merciless tactics are well-documented- engage at your own risk. 		The Collider
25
 Slone https://REDACTED//
This is the moment the Imagined Order has been waiting for. The machinations of their plan are already in motion. And Slone’s not going down without a fight. 		The Collider

Image Name Biography Location
01
 The Visitor Intentions unknown. One of The Seven.
An explorer and navigational expert, here to help chart the best course of action for the Seven. These days he's more of the strong, silent type... 		Launchpad
02
 The Scientist His mission is unknown. One of The Seven.
It's hard to say what people admire most about the Scientist: his brilliant engineer's mind, his dashing good looks, or how skillfully he writes his own bios. 		Sanctuary
03
 Agent Jones Look sharp, we're saving reality.
The Imagined Order's most prominent defector is back, and he's ready to save reality. Sure, there are 7 other people involved, but Agent Jones is definitely the hero here. 		Seven Outposts
04
 The Foundation His mission is Everything. Leader of The Seven.
Defender of Reality. Protector of the Island. Leader of The Seven. 		Sanctuary
05
 Bunker Jonesy Debunk'd.
Skittish, paranoid, and accustomed to being alone. Now constantly surrounded by near-identical copies of himself. I’m sure he’ll be fine. 		The Joneses
06
 Ludwig Best of the wurst.
The friendliest Jonesy this side of Oktoberfest, Ludwig has been trying desperately to give his counterparts some beard styling tips. It is not going well. 		The Joneses
07
 Brainiac Victory takes braaaains.
A simple Jonesy with simple wants: sturdy boots to lurch around in, a shambling ruin to call his own, and braaaaaaaains. 		The Joneses
08
 Mullet Marauder Totally. Totally radical.
What is UP, bodacious bros?! Mullet Marauder is here to keep things totally tubular. Remember: no gnarly vibes allowed! Duh! 		The Joneses
09
 Jonesy The First Never forget your first run.
The “First” means number one. As in, the best Jonesy around. And don’t you forget it! 		The Joneses
10
 Cuddle Team Leader Hug it out.
She’s ready to assume her namesake position and lead the team in a good ol’-fashioned group hug. 		Camp Cuddle
11
 Metal Team Leader Totally metal.
Metal Team Leader knows no cuddle. Metal Team Leader knows only metal. What is love? What is ‘high five’? What is “hug” and how does it relate to bears? 		Camp Cuddle
12
 Cuddlepool Ferociously furry.
She may be cuddly, but she's no team leader. Cuddlepool fights like she's got nothing to lose... except the TACOS loyalty card in her pocket. 		Camp Cuddle
13
 Quackling Quack in action.
A marvelous mallard! A fabulous fowl! Things are just ducky for Quackling right now. She's charmed to make your aquaintance, I'm sure. 		Camp Cuddle
14
 Guaco Stay crunchy, Guaco's comin...
The official mascot of TACOS now oversees the Greasy Grove community with a hard shell and an iron fist. He will unite the food mascots… Or fry trying. 		Greasy Grove
15
 Lil' Whip Whipped up, and ready to serve.
Howdy-hoody, sweetie! Sure, the battle for the fate of reality is upon us... But can you hold a weapon in one hand and a double scoop o' sunshine in the other, can'tcha? 		Coney Crossroads
16
 Bao Bros Steamed up and ready for action.
Stronger than Tomatohead, smarter than LT Whip, and faster than Mancake, Bao Bros would lead the mascots if he didn't respect Guaco so much. Instead, he's his right-hand bao. 		Condo Canyon, previously Greasy Grove
17
 Tomatohead Extra saucy.
He'll team up with any food mascot on the map... Except those tyrants at Durrr Burger. Thos bun-brained burger buskers have no respect for pizza. 		Tilted Towers, previously Greasy Grove
18
 Mancake Forged on a griddle of rage.
Once a bank-robbin' outlaw collectin' stacks on stacks, Mancake's squadding up with the other food folks to form a balanced breakfast. 		Butter Barn
19
 Shanta Journey through the ancestral plane.
Shanta's travelled across the ancestral plane to assist the Island. Her powers - and her enchanted amor - will be indispensible in the fight for the fate of realty. 		Southeast of Condo Canyon
20
 Lt. John Llama Never send an alpaca to do a llama's job.
Lt. John Llama is just one day away from retirement. But before he's put out to pasture, he's got one last mission to complete: revenge in the name of his loot lama brethren. 		Llama Homestead
21
 Haven Raised by the Island. Born to defend it.
Haven is best known for being Scourge's handler. She's able to channel nature's energy through her handmade masks, as though they were imbued with an ancient power... 		Haven's Oasis
22
 Galactico The world will know your name.
The Island's greatest soccer star is back on the field for another round, and he has no qualms about reminding you that it's called "football", not soccer. 		Tilted Towers
23
 Ronin A wanderer whose road will lead him to glory.
Ronin is best described as a lone wanderer, seeking glory in the name of the Order of the Waning Moon. And he will find it at all costs - no matter the outcome. 		Covert Cavern

  • C2S8
  • C2S7
  • C2S6
  • C2S5

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Baba Yaga Do you hear the sound of chicken legs...?
Baba Yaga is a powerful, eccentric witch acutely attuned to the natural world. Her heart is full of magic, and her pockets are full of teeth that may or may not be hers. 		Dampy Dish
02
 Big Mouth Seeking victory, breath mints, and souls.
Everybody wants to talk about the mouth. Why not ask him about his poetry for once? 		The Pizza Pit
03
 Fabio Sparklemane The official mascot of Unicorn Flakes.
HEY THERE! It's me! The beloved mascot-slash-spokeshorse for Unicorn Flakes, cursed to roam the Island shooting cereal out of my hooves until the sun turns to ash in the sky! Want a hug?! 		Apres Ski
04
 Dark Jonesy He has seen beyond the darkness...
The Island's wise oracle, gazing ever fearful into the uncertain future. And darkness is approaching... 		Steamy Stacks
05
 Kor Assassin for hire with some suspicious ties to the IO.
Kor categorically denies any insider knowledge of the IO. She just works for them exclusively as a contract mercenary, okay? Lay off. 		Misty Meadows
06
 Dusk Creatures of the nite pack a dangerous bite.
Traditional vampirism: gauche, tacky, outdated. Dusk's vampirism: chic, modern, and decadent. You're gonna want to be manipulated into her eternal servitude, like, yesterday. 		Primal Pond
07
 Torin A talented hunter with a unique ability to travel to the Sideways at will.
Torin doesn't want to talk about her unique connection to the Sideways. She's here to hunt monsters, and develop new tech for hunting monsters. End of discussion. 		The Aftermath
08
 Grim Fable Once upon a time...
A storyteller and wanderer of the Island's wild places, Grim Fable has developed an interest in the local wildlife.  By "wildlife" we mean "wolves," and by "interest" we mean "interest in keeping them very far away from her at all times." 		Wasted Woods
09
 Kitbash Show 'em what you're made of.
A one-of-a-kind warrior seeking friendship with the humans after a nasty falling out with the Island's small appliances. 		Dirty Docks
10
 Madcap The master of mushrooms enters the fight.
Dedicated defender of the Island's mushrooms. Some say he gained sentience after springing up in juuust the right spot behind the Slurp Factory dumpster. 		Corny Crops
11
 Nitehare Hopping straight out of your nightmares.
Easily the scariest cottontail you'll ever meet, even though he definitely cried when he got his ears pierced. 		FN Radio
12
 Penny When trouble knocks, we’ll build our way out.
Penny's a classically trained architect, considered by most to be one of the Island's master builders. If you've got construction quandaries, Penny's got answers. 		Retail Row
13
 Pitstop Just try to keep up.
Recently anointed Champion of the Island's 3rd annual Stunt Spectacular. If you're riding shotgun with her, well... Hope you brought some flameproof clothes. 		Boney Burbs
14
 Charlotte Your typical transforming, monster-slaying teen with a possessed sword.
Charlotte vehemently refused to provide a bio for this list while making a very rude hand gesture we'd rather not describe. 		Pleasant Park
15
 Raven Brooding master of dark skies.
The master of the skies! The Earl of clouded misery! The Viscount of... midnight... rain...? Raven has big feelings about the sky and a big hood to match. 		Hydro 16
16
 Scuba Jonesy Jonesy of the deep!
Very passionate about all things aquatic. I once spent an entire afternoon talking to Scuba Jonesy about fish. It was... fine. 		Coral Cove
17
 Cube Assassin Unknowable. Unstoppable.
This Cube-allied assassin is a ruthless marksman. Imbued with the power of the Cubes, she'll stop at nothing to defend them. 		Sideways Encounters
18
 J.B. Chimpanski It was all fun and spacewalks... Until they left him behind.
J.B. is a dedicated general organizing the war effort against the cubes. If he happens to find out what happened to the astronauts who abandoned him under suspicious circumstances, well... that would be a plus. 		Weather Station
19
 Toona Fish Greyscale guppy. Aspiring rainbowfish.
An Island visitor from the Inkwell, Toona Fish is on a mission to bring color back to his black-and-white home. Especially orange. He likes orange. 		Viking Vessel
20
 The Brat Relish the wins.
The Brat is a real bro - maybe the most loyal hot dog in the pack. He's great company until you get him talking about his semester abroad. 		Fork Knife Food Truck
21
 Wrath Warden of the underworld.
A sinister ferryboat man and warden of the Underworld, Wrath knows a lot about quests… and what perils may befall you if you fail. 		Stealthy Stronghold
22
 Dire Leader of the pack.
The alpha of the Island's most fearsome and reclusive wolfpack, Dire is an expert melee fighter and tactician with a very, very secret love of squeaky toys. 		Camp Cod
23
 Ragsy Say hello to your worst nightbear.
Ragsy's... Ragsy's been goin' through it, okay? Maybe give Ragsy some space to process everything. And listen to Ragsy when Ragsy talks about shields. Ragsy wants to help. 		Risky Reels
24
 Ariana Grande Fans love her. Monsters fear her.
Oh yeah! We forgot to mention Ariana Grande is the galaxy's best monster hunter. And what about it? 		Believer Beach
25
 Ember Take steady aim with hands of flame.
Playing with fire is dangerous... unless you're Ember, in which case it's her whole deal. 		Scenic Spot
26
 Sledgehammer Demolish the competition.
Sometimes when the going gets tough, you gotta bring the Hammer down. Sledgehammer is a cool guy, though his affinity for spiders isn't for everyone. 		Flopper Pond
27
 Shadow Ops You didn't see a thing.
IO's most enthusiastic field agent, and an expert in stealth and espionage. If you're looking for a tactical advantage, Shadow Ops is your best bet. 		Lazy Lake
28
 Kakashi I'll protect you with my life. Trust me.
Kakashi Hatake is Konoha's most respected shinobi teacher. He is a skilled ninja who appreciates the value of teamwork. Just don't expect him to be on time for anything. 		Primal Pond
29
 Rust Lord King of the scrap heap.
Rust Lord's latest pet project? Recycling scrap into something new and purposeful. Though honestly, I think he just likes spending time amongst the scrap. 		Compact Cars

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Abstrakt The writing's on the wall.
Known only as Abstrakt, the legendary street artist has been leaving his mark on the island for years. His non-stop spray-paint assault on the island won’t stop until he’s created the ultimate unforgettable work of art. 		Retail Row
02
 Human Bill He's just here to observe.
Heir apparent to the Smurgulon family fortune, Human Bill is a suave socialite, and the island is his new playground. He's eager to try out all of his father's inventions without supervision - and he's bringing you along for the ride. Hope you brought a tux! 		Steamy Stacks
03
 Guggimon Fashion horror artist.
Guggi’s the ultimate triple threat. He’s got the looks, he’s got the style, he’s got the axe. 		Lockie’s Lighthouse
04
 Sunny Get me off this rock.
Meh, humanity’s had their shot. Sunny is ready and willing to accept our new alien overlords. What’s the worst that could happen? 		Believer Beach
05
 Bunker Jonesy Debunk'd.
Reports indicate that this might be a Snapshot of one of the first times Jonesy visited the Loop. Being trapped for decades - if not centuries - has left him paranoid and distrustful so approach with caution. 		Lumber Lodge
06
 Bushranger He's one scrappy little tree.
Bushranger has no idea how he ended up on the island, but he knows that none of the other trees are quite like him. Until he can find his way home, he's happy to live of the land and off the beaten path. 		Risky Reels
07
 Dreamflower Can you dig it?
If a happy dream could have a magical wish, that’d be Dreamflower. She lives her life for love, music, and a third thing she can’t quite remember. 		Flopper Pond
08
 Joey The perfect intergalactic double agent.
He may seem tough and violent on the outside, but on the inside, he’s an alien. 		Believer Beach
09
 Hayseed Roll up your sleeves and battle the field.
In a time of great uncertainty, the corn cried out for a hero. Hayseed answered that call. 		Steel Farm
10
 Marigold Break the curse of the Golden Touch.
The curse of the golden touch weighs heavy on Marigold’s mind. 		Lazy Lake
11
 Maven Victory is the common denominator.
Maven’s special skills include advanced knowledge of quantum mechanics, a relentless drive to unravel the mathematical secrets of the universe, and if you ever need to borrow a pencil, she’s always got, like, three or four. 		Dinky Dish
12
 Rick Sanchez The Rickest Rick of them all.
Misanthropic scientist and self-proclaimed smartest man in the multiverse. 		Defiant Dish
13
 Riot Defining the pre-post-punk-post-hardcore scene.
When he’s not playing killer bass for the Grubby Pixies, the Cheeky Blighters, or the Right Nasty Lads, Riot’s teaching cooking classes at his local vegan co-op. Pretty sweet, innit? 		Yellow Steel Bridge
14
 Rook Promoted from desk jockey to field agent.
A new field agent working for [REDACTED], Rook’s determined to find [CLASSIFIED] and get the bottom of [HIGHER CLEARANCE LEVEL REQUIRED]. 		Dockside Dish
15
 Special Forces The Island's original special forces expert.
Stealthy. Tactical. And always ready to go for broke. 		**REDACTED**
16
 Swamp Stalker Master of the mire.
The island’s leading expert in all things slithery, scaly, swampy, and slimy. 		Shack in southern Slurpy Swamp
17
 Doctor Slone https://REDACTED//
Slone has declined all interview requests. 		Corny Complex
18
 Zyg and Choppy A friendship that transcends lightyears.
One's an unregistered ZyrZxx Destructo-Droid, the other's a pint-sized fugitive. Together they're completely unstable. Do. Not. Approach. 		A Growing Garden (Moves Weekly)
19
 Kymera He may or may not come in peace.
[Editor’s note] The Island’s biographer has not been seen since his scheduled interview with Kymera. Out of respect for his squad, this Bio will be left blank. 		Coral Castle
20
 Clark Kent Mild-mannered reporter.
Clark is a dedicated Daily Planet reporter and advocate for justice who's never, ever seen without his glasses. Some might call Clark "mild-mannered" but there's something about him that just feels... super. 		The Orchard
21
 Armored Batman Zero When things get tough, get tougher.
He's Batman. 		Dirty Docks
22
 Beast Boy If you ask him, he's "the cute one."
Beast Boy has two special abilities: he can metamorph into any animal, and he can charm you into handing over that tofu breakfast burrito. Oh, and did we mention he looks great in green? Because he looks great in green. 		Weeping Woods

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Bandolette Unrivaled ambush predator of the jungle.
Once part of a commando squad with her brother, Bandolette has been flying solo for a while now. Specializing in jungle and forest warfare, her trapmaking skills are second-to-none. 		Flushed Building
02
 Gutbomb A good burger gone bad...
Some People Think "The Leftovers" are nothing more than a ghost story told to scare fry cooks around the grease fires, but watch out on those late night dumpster runs because you never know when Gutbomb and his friends might pop up. 		The Durrr Burger
03
 Big Chuggus Small chugguses need not apply.
BIG CHUGGUS LOVE SLURP. 		Shanty Town
04
 Blaze Fill the world with flames.
Blaze's powerful pyrokinetic abilities and unpredictable personality make her a feared enemy on the battlefield. Rumor has it she also makes killer pumpkin muffins. 		Timber Tent
05
 Tess Your best friend or your worst enemy.
Commando. Assassin. Mercenary. Tess has done it all, and she's done it better than most. If she ends up on your side, be very careful not to screw it up because she holds a grudge like nobody's business. Just ask King Krab. 		Dirty Docks
06
 Bunker Jonesy Debunk'd.
Reports indicate that this might be a Snapshot of one of the first times Jonesy visited the Loop. Being trapped for decades - if not centuries - has left him paranoid and distrustful so approach with caution. 		Southeast of Catty Corner. This is one of many spawns, not all of which are known.
07
 Burnout All roads lead to victory.
The masked racer known only as "Burnout" is as mysterious as he is undefeated on the racetrack. Try to keep up with him at your own peril, and if you're ever lucky enough to see his face... keep it to yourself. 		Southwest of Steamy Stacks
08
 Bushranger He's one scrappy little tree.
Bushranger has no idea how he ended up on the island, but he knows that none of the other trees are quite like him. Until he can find his way home, he's happy to live of the land and off the beaten path. 		Pleasant Park
09
 Cole It's a dirty job but somebody's gotta do it.
Cole loves two things: Rocks. And more rocks. Frequently getting himself lost in his own tunnels, he's always got time for someone who wants to talk about either of those topics. 		Steamy Stacks
10
 Deadfire This town ain't big enough...
With a pistol in his hand and some undead magic on his side, Deadfire patrols the plains to keep them free of evil. Prove yourself as a gunslinger and he'll be your ally for (after)life. 		Sheriff's Office
11
 Dummy Look out!
According to Dummy, his personality was copied from the brainwaves of a dead racing legend. Whether that's true or not, he's got a downright irresponsible need for speed and a penchant for encouraging bad behavior in others. 		Compact Cars
12
 Farmer Steel They trampled his corn. Now they're gonna pay.
Part Farmer. Part Tractor-based robot. All vengeance. Farmer Steel knows that the varmints who wrecked his fields are still out there, and he's not gonna rest until he finds them. 		Steel Farm
13
 Kyle Friend of the trees. Most of them, anyway.
Kyle has dedicated his life to following The Way of the Lumberjack. He'll happily share his secrets with you if you can prove that your also a friend of the Way. 		Stumpy Ridge
14
 Snow Sniper Cool and calculated.
No one has ever gotten close enough to the Snow Sniper to learn her real name and that’s just the way she likes it. In her worldview, friends are a liability and she has vowed that she’s never letting her guard down ever again. 		East of Retail Row
15
 Ragnarok The cold harbinger of fate.
The blood of raiders flows through the icy veins of the man known only as Ragnarok. He waits for those who also seek the glory of battlefield spoils. (DO NOT CHALLENGE HIM TO ARM WRESTLING) 		Southwest of Viking Vessel
16
 Remedy Take your medicine.
After E.G.O.’s collapse, Remedy became a freelance medic who uses her unparalleled medical abilities on the battlefield to even the scales. She’s got a strong survival instinct and an even stronger sense of justice. 		Craggy Cliffs
17
 Sparkplug Scrap the competition.
Sparkplug was always taught that if you don't have a fast car, you'll get left behind. A master Mechanic, she can fix just about anything... for a price, of course. 		Chonker's Customs
18
 Splode Countdown to a big boom!
Splode has never met a question that couldn’t be answered with explosives. Currently on the run after escaping a high-security prison, he’s vowed to sow as much chaos as he can before they catch him again. 		Unremarkable Shack
19
 The Reaper Vengeance for hire.
Relentless. Ruthless. The Reaper stops at nothing to get his prey. If you can track him down he might have some bounties to share... if he isn’t already hunting YOU. 		Boost Pad
20
 Crustina Saucy, Spicy, Right Behind You.
She might not look it, but Crustina is Tomatohead's muscle and loyal right-hand. She's an expert at taking care of Tomatohead's "problems" and making sure they're never seen again... so watch what you say around Pizza Pit. 		The Pizza Pit
21
 Triggerfish Stick it to 'em.
