A member of the legendary fish food commando unit, Triggerfish is on the hunt for the chef that ruined his life. Whatever you do, don’t mention sushi. He’s got some... anger issues. 		Crashed Cargo
22
 Turk Hook your prey.
One of E.G.O.’s top survivalists, Turk is on the trail of The Big One: the fish that he believes will net him the title of Top Fisherman. He especially wants to beat his rival and fellow commando, Outcast. 		Green Steel Bridge
23
 Cluck Cheep cheep cheep, cheep cheep b'kaw.
This 25-year old hatchling is searching for the Yolk of Destiny. He's determined to use his mastery of eggsplosives to show the galaxy that he's no chicken. 		Primal Pond
24
 Rebirth Raven Daughter of a demon and founding member of the Teen Titans.
Raven was investigating a disturbance on the astral plane when the Island pulled her in through a portal and left her stranded. She'll need to rely on her wits and strange new alliances if she wants to get back home again. 		Rebirth Raven's House
25
 Tarana A speaker for the Old World.
Tarana was born with the rare ability to see visions of the island's past using its many strange artifacts. Her village can't decide wheter this knowledge is a blessing... or a curse. 		Boney Burbs
26
 Raz On a mission to uncover the Spire's Secrets.
Ever since he was a boy, the Spire has called to Raz in his dreams. Now, after a lifetime of training, he is finally ready to tackle its darkest mysteries. 		Colossal Crops
27
 Lara Croft The extraordinary is in what we do, not who we are.
Last thing Lara remembers, she was investigating an ancient artifact in a strange temple. Now, she’s here on the Island. She’s not sure how she got here or how to get home, but there’s one thing certain: She doesn’t intend to lose. 		Stealthy Stronghold
28
 Shade Stay cool.
Shade is the driver of the elusive Cobra Crew, but she doesn’t get wrapped up in the drama and rivalries - All she needs to be happy is a good pair of wheels, a full tank of gas, and the open road. 		Sweaty Sands
29
 Jules Engineering perfection with a mysterious twist.
Jules is the daughter of an international crime boss who refuses to live in her dad’s shadow. Left to fend for herself, she learned how to rebuild the world the way she wanted to see it and is on track to be one of the greatest inventors of all time. 		Camp Cod
30
 Rex Hunting the competition to extinction.
MISSION LOG: Rawr! 		Dusted Depot
31
 Cabbie First to the fare. First to the finishline.
MISSION LOG: Just drive. 		Lazy Lake
32
 Wreck Raider Wrecks to riches.
MISSION LOG: Investigate rumors of sharks. Don’t get bitten. Don’t fall in love. 		Coral Castle
33
 Sun Tan Specialist Don't get burned.
MISSION LOG: Vacation. Sun’s out, guns out. My, uh, arm guns. Not real guns. But my arm guns are just as dangerous if you know what I’m say—I need to stop talking. 		Sweaty Sands
34
 Castaway Jonesy He's not lost, okay?
MISSION LOG: Terminally stranded and ravenously hungry. 		Island north of Steamy Stacks
35
 Slurp Jonesy Slurp up and ship out.
MISSION LOG: [DATA CORRUPTED, SUBJECT LOST.] 		Slurpy Swamp
36
 Grill Sergeant Make it sizzle.
MISSION LOG: Infiltrate Cafeteria Wars. Status: Greasy. 		Durrr Burger Food Truck
37
 Jonesy The First Never forget your first run.
MISSION LOG: I’m not sure if this was a good idea... 		Pleasant Park
38
 Sash Sergeant Set up camp and start a firefight.
MISSION LOG: Explore the island’s flora and... animals. Why can’t I remember the fancy word for that? 		Weeping Woods
39
 Raptor Royale Air Force test pilot.
With his naturally competitive nature, Raptor took to the Loop quicker than most. He’s a true daredevil who has a very hard time turning down any challenges that come his way, even stupid ones. Okay, “especially” stupid ones. 		Crash Site
40
 Blackheart The dreaded captain of the stormy seas.
A pirate so feared, most sailors won't even speak his name for fear that he might hear them. But if you just get to know him, he's actually not such a bad guy- 		Viking Vessel
41
 The Good Doctor He's got some inner demons.
A brilliant scientist plagued by insecurities, the Good Doctor thought science was the solution to become stronger, more confident, more powerful. It worked... but it came at a price. 		Steamy Stacks
42
 Power Chord Bring on the noise complaints.
A head-banging, guitar-shredding, rebel and lover of chaos, Power Chord has never met an amp she didn’t want to kick over in the name of punk. Don’t even think of challenging her record collection. 		Apres Ski
43
 Stage Slayer Crank it up!
This guy loves any music so long as it’s LOUD. Accuse him of being a poser all you want, he’ll never hear you because his hearing is absolute trash these days. For obvious reasons. 		FN Radio
44
 Willow A wandering spirit with unfinished business.
Sarcastic and snarky, Willow would never admit her real unfinished business: Picking the perfect emoji to punctuate a text to her crush. 		Weeping Woods
45
 Cobb Shake off that husk and grab some butter.
The product of a doomed experiment involving radiation and farm-to-table produce, Cobb lives a waking nightmare that he may never escape until reality itself collapses. In the meantime, at least he can listen to ska. 		Risky Reels
46
 Zenith Peak performance at any elevation.
As long as he can remember, Zenith has always wanted to climb towards the sky. Absolutely deadly at high elevation, if you’re ever lost in the mountains and feel like you’re being watched... it might be him. 		Weather Station
47
 Derby Dominator Leave your rivals in the dust.
Derby Dominator would rather lose in style than ever be accused of not trying. After all, you're not a try-hard if you're actually just better than everyone else...right? 		Holly Hedges
48
 Galactico The world will know your name.
As far as Galactico is concerned, life is nothing but one big competition... A competition that he's going to win, or epxlode in a blaze of glory trying. 		Pleasant Park
49
 Shot Stopper Nothing gets by you.
In Shot Stopper's world, if you're not winning, you're losing. Even if you're on her team, you better keep up if you don't want to be left behind. 		Dirty Docks
50
 Orelia Golden treasure, a sacred duty.
Legends say this restless spirit still haunts her throne and fiercely defends the treasure she hoarded when she was alive. Grave robbers beware. 		Isla Nublada

Image Name Biography Location
01
 Lexa Don't let the cute face fool you.
Armed with a fearless attitude and cybernetic suit of armor built by her father, Lexa is always ready to add another trophy to her wall. 		Hunter's Haven
02
 Reese Master monster hunter from a different star system.
Reese was an orphan who learned early that you can either hunt... or be hunted. She chose the former and dedicated her life to being the universe's greatest hunter. 		Dirty Docks
03
 Menace Under the eye of his ancestors he is the coliseum's greatest champion.
In his countless battles against man and beast, Menace has never known defeat. Whispers say that his armor was a gift from his ancestors and haunted by restless spirits. 		Colossal Coliseum
04
 Mancake Forged on a griddle of rage with a stack of warrants out for his arrest.
This bank-robbing outlaw is wanted in towns far and wide. What does he need all that money for? No one is sure, but some folks says he's got a bit of a syrup habit. 		Butter Barn
05
 Mave This generation's Wildheart and sword defender of her jungle world.
Once per generation, Mave's tribe chooses a Wildheart to be the shapeshifting defender of their jungle world. She sees this mission from Jonesy to be another test from the gods. 		Shipwreck Cove
06
 Kondor Spirit of vengeance / gift to an ancient ruler / none escape his sight.
Handed down ruler-to-ruler through the centuries, the vengeful spirit known as Kondor is thought by many to be nothing more than an urban legend. 		Misty Meadows
07
 The Mandalorian Bounty hunter from a galaxy far, far away.
A formidable hunter and an enigmatic man of few words, the Mandalorian is the last person you want on your tail. 		The Razor Crest

Kit's Cantina

08
 The Reaper Vengeance for hire.
Relentless. Ruthless. The Reaper stops at nothing to get his prey. If you can track him down he might have some bounties to share... if he isn't already hunting YOU. 		Boost Pad
09
 Brutus Don't make him tell you twice.
After the war between GHOST and SHADOW, Brutus decided to go into business for himself as a buyer, seller, and builder of weapons. He's determined to work his way to the top of the underworld at any cost. 		Dirty Docks
10
 Deadfire This town ain't big enough...
With a pistol in his hand and some undead magic on his side, Deadfire patrols the plains to keep them free of evil. Prove yourself as a gunslinger and he'll be your ally for (after)life. 		Sheriff's Office
11
 Triggerfish Stick it to 'em.
A member of the legendary Fish Food commando unit, Triggerfish is on the hunt for the chef that ruined his life. A word of advice: He's got some anger issues, so whatever you do, don't mention sushi. 		Crashed Cargo
12
 Bullseye I never miss.
Bullseye is a hyper-competitive soldier determined to become the island's top mercenary. She'll dish out her best to anyone brave enough to challenge her, and trash-talk them the entire time. 		Steamy Stacks
13
 Bandolier No shirt. No surrender.
Handsome and suave, Bandolier is an old-school mercenary whose pecs pack as much punch as his shotgun. Show him your moves and you'll be swapping working tips in no time. 		Flushed Building
14
 Longshot No target is out of range.
Longshot's perfect aim and incredible patience make him terrific a wildlife photographer, but that skill isn't as handy here. These days he's mostly looking for work as a sniper instead. 		Misty Meadows
15
 Splode Countdown to a big boom!
Splode never met a question that couldn't be answered with explosions. Currently on the run after escaping a high security prison, he's determined to sow as much chaos as he can before they catch him again. 		Unremarkable Shack
16
 Blaze Fill the world with flames.
Blaze's powerful pyrokinetic abilities and unpredictable personality make her a feared enemy on the battlefield. Rumor has it she also makes killer pumpkin muffins. 		Timber Tent
Pristine Point
17
 Remedy Take your medicine.
Remedy is a freelance medic who uses her unparalleled medical abilities on the battlefield to even the scales. She's got a strong survival instinct and an even stronger sense of justice. 		Craggy Cliffs
Hilltop House
18
 Big Chuggus Small chugguses need not apply.
BIG CHUGGUS LOVE SLURP. 		Shanty Town
Slurpy Swamp
19
 Kyle Friend of the trees. Most of them, Anyway.
Kyle has dedicated his life to following The Way of the Lumberjack. He'll happily share his secrets with you if you can prove that your also a friend of the Way. 		Weeping Woods
Lumber Lodge
20
 Cole It's a dirty job but somebody's gotta do it.
Cole loves two things: Rocks. And more rocks. Frequently getting himself lost in his own tunnels, he's always got time for someone who wants to talk about either of those topics. 		Retail Row

Shipwreck Cove

21
 Ragnarok The cold harbinger of fate.
The blood of raiders flows through the icy veins of the man known only as Ragnarok. He waits for those who also seek the glory of battlefield spoils. (DO NOT CHALLENGE HIM TO ARM WRESTLING) 		Viking Vessel
22
 Bushranger He's one scrappy little tree.
Bushranger has no idea how he ended up on the island, but he knows that none of the other trees are quite like him. Until he can find his way home, he's happy to live of the land and off the beaten path. 		Salty Towers
Rapid's Rest
The Pizza Pit
23
 Dummy Look out!
According to Dummy, his personality was copied from the brainwaves of a dead racing legend. Whether that's true or not, he's got a downright irresponsible need for speed and a penchant for encouraging bad behavior in others. 		Pleasant Park
Compact Cars
24
 Sparkplug Scrap the competition.
Sparkplug was always taught that if you don't have a fast car, you'll get left behind. A master Mechanic, she can fix just about anything... for a price, of course. 		Weeping Woods
Lazy Lake
Hydro 16
25
 Burnout All roads lead to victory.
The masked racer known only as "Burnout" is as mysterious as he is undefeated on the racetrack. Try to keep up with him at your own perill, and if your ever lucky enough to see his face.... keep it to yourself. 		Sweaty Sands
Steamy Stacks
FN Radio
26
 Turk Hook your prey.
Turk is on the trail of The Big One: the fish that he believes will net him the title of Top Fisherman. He especially wants to beat his rival and fellow commando, Outcast. 		Lazy Lake Island
Steamy Stacks
Lake Canoe
27
 Outcast Reel 'em in!
Outcast has always has a knack for self-promotion. She believes that she's always destined to be Top Fisherman and look fabulous while she does it... No matter what her rival, Turk, says. 		Flopper Pond
Sweaty Sands
28
 Rapscallion Bail out of the Battle Bus.
The daughter of wealthy socialites, Rapscallion became a thief just for the thrill of it. She's got dozens of heists under her belt and is always looking for new members for her crew... Just make sure you watch your wallet. 		Lazy Lake
Holly Hedges
29
 Sleuth This detective is on the case.
GHOST, SHADOW... To the master detective known as Sleuth, they're all just criminals. He's determined to unravel their web and put an end to their war. Help him track down enemy agents and you'll be handsomely rewarded. 		Sweaty Sands
Retail Row
30
 Grimbles This garden gnome is at home on the roam in a snowy biome.
A wandering trickster known for planting puzzles and secrets all over the island, Grimbles is hard to pin down and even harder to trust. If rumors are true, he has spies in every nook and cranny... 		Fort Crumpet
31
 Sunflower Certified organic.
Sunflower might be a pacifist who would rather just farm and work in her garden all day, but if you threaten her plants you better be ready to defend yourself. 		The Orchard
32
 Farmer Steel They trampled his corn. Now they're gonna pay.
Part Farmer. Part Tractor-based robot. All vengeance. Farmer Steel knows that the varmints who wrecked his fields are still out there, and he's not gonna rest until he finds them. 		Steel Farm
33
 Doggo Who's a good boy?
This very good boy loves car rides, tummy scratches, and second helpings. He's not great with cats, but so long as they give each other space there shouldn't be any problems. 		Pleasant Park
Retail Row
34
 Kit Proudly following in his father's pawprints.
The son of a legendary secret agent, Kit is a pint-size robotics genius who has vowed to use his skills to fight the forces of evil just like his dad. 		Catty Corner
35
 Beef Boss Victory well done.
As the leader of Durr Burger, Beef Boss has sworn to defend the land from lesser quick-service restaurants. Prove yourself an ally, and he'll have no quarrel with you. But if you're a pizza sympathizer... beware. 		The Durr Burger
Durrr Burger Food Truck
36
 Tomato Head Extra saucy.
If you ask Tomatohead, Durr Burger is nothing but a bunch of tyrants. Beneath his humble uniform beats the heart of a warrior who won't rest until Pizza has claimed its rightful place as the best fast food. 		The Pizza Pit
Pizza Pete's Food Truck
37
 Bunker Jonesy Debunk'd.
Reports indicate that this might be a Snapshot of one of the first times Jonesy visited the Loop. Being trapped for decades - if not centuries - has left him paranoid and distrustful so approach with caution. 		Camp Cod
Shipwreck Cove
38
 Bigfoot International man of mystery.
This camera-shy forest-dweller doesn't have much use for civilization and would rather just be left alone. When he's not evading documentation he loves a good game of solitaire. 		A tree
39
 Ruckus Bring the bedlam.
Out in the desert, you can either fight to survive... or you can raise a ruckus. The choice for this wastelander was obvious. 		Hydro 16
40
 Fishstick Keep far away from Maki Master.
Fishstick knows that he left his pond for a reason... a reason which he'll definitely remember soon. He swears he was once a warrior of Atlantis, he just doesn't remember where he left his armor, either. 		Coral Castle
Craggy Cliffs
41
 Snowmando He's a jolly happy soldier.
Snowmando would actually rather work on perfecting his hot cocoa recipe than all this "fighting," but he knows that a snowman's gotta do what a snowman's gotta do. 		The Holidays
42
 Predator The demon who makes trophies of men.
Throughout the galaxy, there are few species feared more than the Yautja. Fierce warriors that kill for honor and sport, this one followed Jones through a rift and is eager to sample all the new prey the island has to offer. 		Stealthy Stronghold

  • Chapter 5
  • Chapter 4
  • Chapter 3
  • Chapter 2

  • C7S2
  • C7S1

 Noir Infiltrating the seedy underbelly of Tilted Towers. Seaport City Removed

 Santa Suit Mariah All she wants for Winterfest is you! Giant Ice Block Removed

 Santa Dogg Get ready for Snoop on the Stoop. Crackshot's Cabin Removed

 Daigo Man of a thousand faces. Warrior's Watch Removed

Undercover Skye Various Book not present in the Season
Meowdas Say hello to buff kitty. The Yacht Book not present in the Season
Dynamo TNTina Makes BIG BOOMS!
Demolition Specialist. Has a boom bow and knows how to use it! 		The Rig Book not present in the Season

Image Name Biography Location Other
Emma Frost The Raft Excluded
Boss
Mysterio Doomstadt Excluded
Boss
Doombot Castle Doom Excluded
Boss
10
 Peelverine Nanamantium infused skeleton with a ripen-eration mutant ability.
Fresh out of the experimental lab, Peelverine isn't about to let Doom ruin his new-found freedom. He's a fighting nana, and the way he sees it, this island is worth fighting for. 		Southwest of Reckless Railways Replaced
Ultima Carver Brawler's Patch Excluded
Boss
Billy Freaky Fields Excluded
Boss

Image Name Biography Location Other
Megalo Don Brutal Beachhead Excluded
Boss
The Machinist Redline Rig Excluded
Boss
Ringmaster Scarr Nitrodrome Excluded
Boss
02
 Backbone King of the highway.
Life on the road is an ever moving journey. A journey Backbone calls home. Now Megalo Don and his marauders are threatening that home, and Backbone refuses to let that ride. 		Rebel's Roost Removed
17
 Power Chord Bring on the noise complaints.
Can music ever be TOO loud? NO! NO IT CAN'T! And Power Chord's here to prove that music is always better when it's cranked to ELEVEN! 		Underworld Station Removed
18
 Riot Defining the pre-post-punk-post-hardcore scene.
Riot never lets the party go unrocked! And, if he can get on board Megalo Don's ship, he'll make sure to rock that boat with his sweet tunes, too! 		Slumberyard Removed
08
 Chopper No one crosses Chopper and rides away.
Listen, you wanna solve all the problems in the world? Go find someone else to drag into Megalo Don's mess. Looks like Hope and Vengeance Jones have that covered. 		Hazy Hillside Tunnel Removed
Wanderer Various Excluded
Removed
11
 Dummy Look out!
New wasteland, new Dummy! Or at least, that's the dream. Dummy's willing to do whatever it takes, including helping around at Pea Bois HQ, to earn his wastelander glow-up. 		Piney Pumps Replaced
04
 Jack Sparrow That's "Captain" Jack Sparrow.
Some say Captain Jack Sparrow is the greatest pirate who ever lived. He is as skilled with his wit and charm as he is with a sword and sails. 		Outside Coral Buddy Cave Removed
03
 Captain Barbossa Master pirate and mutineer.
One of the nine Pirate Lords and sometime captain of the Black Pearl. Captain Barbossa wants to sail the high seas freely and eat bushels of apples. 		Shipwreck Shallows Removed
09
 Davy Jones Infamous captain of the Flying Dutchman.
Captain of the Flying Dutchman, Davy Jones offers sailors the chance to starve off death in exchange for 100 years of service aboard his ship. Would you take that offer? 		West of The Underworld Removed
11
 Elizabeth Swann Pirate King and captain of her fleet.
Strong, intelligent, courageous. Elizabeth Swann is many things, and now she is the Pirate King! Voted into power by the Pirate Lords of the Brethren Court. 		Pleasant Piazza Removed

Image Name Biography Location Other
Zeus Mount Olympus Excluded
Boss
Ares Brawler's Battleground Excluded
Boss
Hades The Underworld Excluded
Boss
Cerberus Grim Gate Excluded
Boss
10
 Marigold Break the curse of the Golden Touch.
Marigold has long searched for any sign of Midas' whereabouts after his disappearance. With clues surfacing, she has called the old gang back together... but is this gold rush a wild goose chase? 		Seaside Villa Removed
12
 Jules Engineering perfection with a mysterious twist.
Brilliant inventor Jules is ready to see what opportunities arrive on the Island with these godly newcomers. But will it throw a wrench in her plans when she hears whispers of her father Midas's return? 		Piney Pumps Removed
13
 Skye Find your greatest adventure.
It's been a long time since cheerful adventurer Skye thought about her former crew, especially her old boss Midas. But with Marigold calling the gang back together, she has to wonder what's coming... 		Catcher's Cove Removed
14
 TNTina Light the fuse and run the world.
TNTina has brought her explosive charm back to the Island, after a call from some old friends. But is the operative with a short fuse ready to rebuild old bridges, instead of blowing them to pieces? 		Ship It! Station Removed
10
 Brutus Don't make him tell you twice.
Benevolent bruiser Brutus has taken the reins of Midas's crew after the boss's disappearance. Showing up on the Island after Marigold's call, he's wondering: is the old boss coming back? 		The Marigold Removed
16
 Ascendant Midas
Shade Midas 		The golden king rises.
Ever since his fall from grace, Midas has been biding his time in The Underworld. But he is not the type you can keep prisoner for long, and a new Midas is ready to rise... 		Spawn Island Removed
17
 Aang He may have a lot to learn, but this young Avatar can save the world.
The last Airbender, Aang has been trapped in an iceberg for the past 100 years. Now that he's free, he must accept his responsibilities as the Avatar, master all four elements, and bring balance back to the world. 		Elemental Shrines Removed
18
 Zuko Disgraced prince of the Fire Nation, seeking redemption.
Prince of the Fire Nation and heir to the throne, Zuko must find the Avatar to restore his honor. Though, he must wonder: does his destiny lead down a different path? 		Elemental Shrines Removed
19
 Katara The last Waterbender of the Southern Water Tribe.
Katara is the only Waterbender left in the Southern Water Tribe. To help Aang fulfill his destiny and save the world, she will need to grow from novice to master. 		Elemental Shrines Removed
20
 Toph Earthbending prodigy who invented the art of metalbending.
Known by some as the Blind Bandit, Toph is an Earthbender ready to tackle any challenge head on. With any luck, they won't even see her coming. 		Elemental Shrines Removed
Darth Vader Piney Lane Excluded
Boss
Chewbacca Imperial Blockades Excluded

Image Name Biography Location Other
Valeria Reckless Railways Excluded
Boss
Montague Grand Glacier Excluded
Boss
Peter Griffin Snooty Steppes Excluded
Boss
Oscar Lavish Lair Excluded
Boss
Nisha Fencing Fields Excluded
Boss
Krampus Cliffside Lodge Excluded
Removed
Sgt. Winter Winterburg Excluded
Removed
Boss
09
 Holiday Boxy Always be present.
Last year, Boxy forgot to get everyone a present. This year she's determined to give everyone the best, most spectacular, super stupendous present she can think of: her fantastic company. 		Ship It! Station Replaced
15
 April O'Neil Channel 6 News' investigative reporter in the field.
Nothing fazes April, not even four mutated Turtles who know ninjutsu. Okay, maybe that fazed her a little. But now, she's here to help the Turtles take down the Foot Clan. 		Rescue Station Removed
17
 Master Splinter Stoic sage, adoptive father and ninjutsu master who adores his sons.
A ninjutsu master even before the Mutagen changed him, Master Splinter raised the Turtles as his sons, and taught them the way of the ninja to protect themselves from the outside world. 		Turtle Lair Removed

  • C4S4
  • C4S3

  • C4S1

Clubs Dealer Slappy Shores
Slappy Shores

MEGA City
Rumble Ruins 		Excluded
Boss
Commanding Card Forecast Towers Excluded
Boss
19
 The Autumn Queen Ruler of the forest.
The Autumn Queen, the benevolent ruler of the Autumnwood, is a wild force of nature connected to the heart of the Island. What does her growing sense of unease mean for the Island's future? 		Forest Forge Removed

Image Name Biography Location Other
Wildguard Relik Rumble Ruins Excluded
Boss
Highcard Eastern Watch
Meadow Mansion
Secluded Spire

Image Name Biography Location Other
Triarch Nox Lonely Labs
Windcatch Lake 		Excluded
Highcard MEGA City
Shattered Slabs
Brutal Bastion 		Excluded
Boss
16
 Cluck Cheep cheep cheep, cheep cheep b'kaw.
It's springtime, and Cluck is excited to stretch his wings and explore the farm! As long as Sunflower doesn't try to get him to do chores... 		Forest Forge Removed
Dahlia Self-made. Self-perfected.
Soft-spoken Dahlia might seem like a wallflower, but this genius bio-hacker has eyes everywhere in MEGA City and she's always playing to win. 		MEGA City Excluded
Styx Nobody crosses him twice.
Focus has never been Styx's forte. Not when he could be chasing chaos or making problems for people he doesn't like. And there are a LOT of people he doesn't like. 		The Herald Tree Excluded
Serenade Transformed by tranquil waters.
Once a lonely wanderer, Serenade gained powerful mystical abilities and now roams the lands around MEGA City, assisting those in need... for a price. 		Marine Monoliths
Mossy Monoliths
Mountain Monoliths 		Excluded
06
 NEURALYNX Ready for whenever cat-astrophe strikes.
Very few have seen NEURALYNX prowling around Mega City, which is just the way she likes it. Sticking with her means sticking to the shadows. 		Windcatch Lake Removed
Clone Trooper You're not a Separatist, are you?
The 501st's Torrent Company has set up outposts across the island. Their mission? To root out members of the Separatist Alliance, by orders of Chancellor Palpatine. 		Clone Checkpoints Excluded
Removed
Darth Vader Republic outpost near The Stone Tower Excluded
Removed

Image Name Biography Location Other
Herald Herald's Sanctum Excluded
Boss
Curdle Scream Leader The ultimate monster mashup.
No one knows from whence this abomination came and that's probably for the best. You could ask it, but you'll only get screams in return. 		Between Tilted Towers and The Devoured Excluded
Removed
Ash Williams Ashley Joanna Williams, Deadite Enemy #1
Just a regular guy trying to save his friends from an ancient unstoppable evil. Has a hard time with Latin. 		The Knowby Cabin Excluded
Removed
Willow Willow's Haunt Excluded
Removed
Boss
Inkquisitor Grim Gables Excluded
Removed
Boss
Imperial Stormtrooper Wear the armor of an Imperial stormtrooper.
Rumor has it the Island is harboring high-ranking members of the Rebellion. These footsoldiers of the Empire will not rest until the rebel threat is found... And neutralized. 		Stormtrooper Checkpoints Excluded
Removed
Darth Vader Imperial Docking Bays Excluded
Removed
Boss

Image Name Biography Location Other
Darth Vader Imperial Docking Bays Excluded
Removed
Boss
Summer Drift Drifting through the sunshine.
Hang ten, my dudes! Summer Drift is everything his name suggests. He'd rather be catching a gnarly wave or evening out his sweet tan but a beach bash isn't that bad either! 		Beach near Sanctuary Excluded
Removed
Boardwalk Ruby Sometimes you've gotta check out the beach.
Boardwalk Ruby is just out for some fun in the sun. She's definitely not a secret agent on a secret mission with a top secret agenda. Where did you hear that? 		Beach near Sanctuary Excluded
Removed
Unpeely No peel, no shoes, no problem.
A banana's natural habitat is a warm, temperate climate, so of course Unpeely's at the beach.Though it doesn't make it any less shocking to see a banana man without his peel. 		Beach near Sanctuary Excluded
Removed
01
 Lil' Whip Whipped up, and ready to serve.
Lil' Whip's borrowed a LOT of Bars to create his new rap EP. If he doesn't start moving records or cones quickly, he'll be in a sprinkle of trouble with his benefactor... 		Various Removed
25
 The Foundation His mission is Everything. Leader of The Seven.
The Foundation led the Loopers to victory. No cost was too great, and no strategy too bold. Though in retrospect, maybe the big statue was a bit much. 		Seven Outpost VII Removed
06
 The Visitor Intentions unknown. One of The Seven.
As the Visitor puts down roots and finds peace on the Island, he finds himself asking: could his visiting days finally be over? Could he finally become... the Permanent Resident? 		Launchpad Removed
11
 The Imagined Her past is the key to our future. One of The Seven.
What identity crisis? The Imagined knows that her mysterious past could remain mysterious forever, and she's FINE with it. Totally. Unless you've heard something...? 		Seven Outpost V Removed
27
 The Order Her honor will lead us to victory. One of the Seven.
The Order is prepared to follow the Origin's instructions... Whenever he decides what he's doing next. Until then, she's maintaining her perimeter and preparing for her next mission. 		Seven Outpost IV Removed
34
 Bulma Brilliant scientist and a daughter of the founder of the Capsule Corporation.
It seems that she came to visit the island because she was asked by Kamesennin to repair his machine. 		Kame House Removed

Image Name Biography Location Other
IO Hunter Help The Seven Reclaim Excluded
Removed
Imperial Stormtrooper Wear the armor of an Imperial Stormtrooper.
The Imagined Order has recruited the Galactic Empire's finest soldiers to do what they do best - stay sharp, aim true, and eradicate the rebel threat. 		Stormtrooper Checkpoints Excluded
Removed

Image Name Biography Location Other

Removed

Gunnar Covert Cavern Excluded

Image Name Biography Location Other
Doctor Slone IO Staging Facility Excluded
The Mummy Lurching into battle with bandages to spare.
He's returned to the Island from the Underworld, and he is NOT happy about it. Any and all Bars spent with him will go toward his Return-to-the-Underworld fund. 		Hey Boo! Megastore Excluded
Removed
Graven Brooding master of the cursed tomb.
Raven went on one (1) beach vacation and well... He's like this now. Don't get him going about sandboarding. You'll be here all day. 		Dusted Depot Excluded
Removed
Containment Specialist Ghosts? Not on his watch.
If there's something strange in your neighborhood, well... you might need a containment specialist. I'd give him a call if I were you. 		Camp Cod Excluded
Removed

Image Name Biography Location Other
Beach Brutus Show off that beach bodyguard.
Nothing, not even an alien invasion, will keep him from enjoying his vacation. 		Believer Beach Excluded
Removed
Guy Excluded
Trespasser Various Excluded

Image Name Biography Location Other
41
 Hyde He's got some inner demons.
A terrifying monster plagued by dreams of a past life lost to arrogance and recklessness. The monster lives... but at what cost? 		Steamy Stacks Excluded
Overlapped by The Good Doctor
Webster Surrender your breadcrumbs.
A recent "graduate" from Kitbash's Home For Mechanical Atrocities, this robotic duck isn't going to waste one second of his newfound freedom. 		Various Excluded
Removed

Boss

Scrapped Characters[]

  • C4S2
  • C5S1
  • C5S3
  • C7S1

Image Name Biography
Lt. John Llama Never send an alpaca to do a llama's job.
Heavy Specialist. Lt. John Lllama is immune to fire and loves explosions.

Image Name Biography
Renee Technical design, tactical precision.
Taking down The Society requires someone equipped for their cold stares. Luckily, Renee is always prepared, and always ready to design a solution.

Image Name Biography
Jing Wipe the slate clean and start anew.
Honor is scarce in the wasteland. Jing seeks to bring it back. While the marauders fight for control over Nitro, Jing fights for the hearts of the wastelanders.
Hard Charger Gassed up and ready to ride.
When it comes to racing through the wasteland, Hard Charger is undefeated. He knows where to go, which shortcuts to take, and most importantly, where the best pitstops are.
Bushranger He's one scrappy little tree.
This wasteland is so sandydirt and windyrough, but Bushy is one tough little tree! He's ready for his new life as a wastelander... though he'll definitely need to hydrate under that hot sun.

Image Name Biography
Peely Go bananas.

Planned Characters[]

Main Article: Unreleased AIs
History

History[]

  • Chapter 2
  • Chapter 3
  • Chapter 4
  • Chapter 5
  • Chapter 6
  • Chapter 7

  • C2S5
  • C2S6
  • C2S7
  • C2S8

Update v15.00[]

December 2nd 2020

  • Added the Character Collection Book to accompany the arrival of Characters to the Apollo Island.

December 12th 2020

  • Mandalorian now spawns near Colossal Coliseum.

Update v15.10[]

December 15th 2020

  • Added Snowmando as a Character. He can be found in Base Camp Hotel.
  • Fixed Big Chuggus' 3 Locations glitch.

December 26th 2020

  • Mandalorian now spawns near Pleasant Park.

January 10th 2021

  • Mandalorian now spawns near Salty Towers.

Update v15.20[]

January 13th 2021

  • Ruckus now spawns back as a ghost Character.

Update v15.21[]

January 20th 2021

  • Added Predator as a Boss. He can be found in Stealthy Stronghold.

January 24th 2021

  • Mandalorian now spawns near GHOST House.

Update v15.30[]

February 2nd 2021

  • Mandalorian now spawns at Kit's Cantina.

Update v16.00[]

March 16th 2021

  • Updated the Character Collection Book with new and more Characters.

Update v16.10[]

April 1st 2021

  • Added Webster as a Character. He can be found anywhere around the Island.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.

April 8th 2021

  • Webster was removed as Spring Breakout 2021 Event ended.

Update v16.20[]

April 13th 2021

  • Added Sparkplug as a Character. She can be found on Chonker's Customs.

Update v16.30[]

April 27th 2021

  • Added Derby Dominator as a Character. She can be found in Holly Hedges.
  • Added Galactico as a Character. He can be found in Pleasant Park.
  • Added Shot Stopper as a Character. She can be found in Dirty Docks.

Update v16.40[]

May 11th 2021

  • Added Orelia as a Character. She can be found on Isla Nublada.

Update v17.00[]

June 8th 2021

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book, but now with 17 Characters. Character #2 is unnamed and cannot be found, though this will likely be fixed in a future update.
  • With the recent Team Rumble update, Characters whose spawn point is inside the current storm, before the Battle Bus launches, won't spawn at all, even if they are able to respawn as ghosts.

Update v17.10[]

June 22nd 2021

  • Added Human Bill as a Character. He can be found in Steamy Stacks.
  • Added Beach Brutus as a Character. He can be found in Believer Beach.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Zyg and Choppy as a Boss. They can be found in Hydro 16.
    • They were removed within an hour, because they got released earlier than intended.
  • Joey moved to Believer Beach.
  • Some other Characters from Chapter 2: Season 6 were added, and the only interaction they have is to do the same Emote as them, even if you don't own said Emote. After interacting with them, they will throw a Chug Splash at the player every 10 seconds.
  • Some existing Characters and unmarked Characters have also been replaced by doppelgängers, and are actually Trespassers in disguise.

July 6th 2021

  • Added Zyg and Choppy back as a Boss at Hydro 16.
    • Beach Brutus no longer spawns at Believer Beach.
    • Joey moved back to Dirty Docks.

July 13th 2021

  • Zyg and Choppy moved to Weeping Woods.

Update v17.20[]

July 20th 2021

  • Added Kymera as a Character. He can be found in Coral Castle.
  • Zyg and Choppy moved to The Aftermath.

Update v17.21[]

July 27th 2021

  • Bushranger appears to have died after attempting to raise Alien Parasites. He can no longer be found in his normal spot, and there was a fresh pile of dirt and flowers nearby.

Update v17.30[]

August 3rd 2021

  • 3 New NPCs were added to the files, but didn't spawn in-game until the Superman Quests arrived.
    • Beast Boy - found in Weeping Woods
    • Clark Kent - found in The Orchard
    • Armored Batman Zero - found in Dirty Docks
  • Zyg and Choppy have been traveling once more from The Aftermath to in between Pleasant Park and Guardian of the Bay.
  • Bushranger has begun to regrow after his untimely demise.

Update v17.40[]

August 17th 2021

  • Zyg and Choppy have been spotted at Craggy Cliffs near the house on the hill.

Update v17.50[]

August 31st 2021

  • Zyg and Choppy are across the river from Retail Row now, their final position of the season.

Update v18.00[]

September 13th 2021

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 17 new Characters. Character #17 is Wrath but cannot be found, due to him being scheduled to appear in Week 2 of the Season.
  • Characters no longer spawn in Team Rumble.
  • The Chug Splash Characters now include Characters from Chapter 2: Season 7.
  • Trespassers are no longer disguised as Characters in the map, due to them being removed except for a lone one in Extra-Terrestrial Estate.

September 21st 2021

  • Added Wrath as a Character. He can be found in Stealthy Stronghold.

Update v18.10[]

September 28th 2021

  • Added Big Mouth as a Character. He can be found in The Pizza Pit.
  • Added Grim Fable as a Character. She can be found in Wasted Woods.

October 5th 2021

  • Added Nitehare as a Character. He can be found in FN Radio.
  • Added Raven as a Character. He can be found in Hydro 16.

Update v18.20[]

October 12th 2021

  • Added Dire as a Character. He can be found in Camp Cod.
  • Added Ragsy as a Character. She can be found in Risky Reels.

Update v18.21[]

October 19th 2021

  • Added Ariana Grande as a Character. She can be found in Believer Beach.
  • Added The Mummy as a Character. He can be found in Hey Boo! Megastore.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Graven as a Character. He can be found in Dusted Depot.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Containment Specialist as a Character. He can be found in Camp Cod.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.

Update v18.30[]

November 2nd 2021

  • Graven, The Mummy and Containment Specialist were removed as Fortnitemares: Wrath of the Cube Queen Event ended.
    • Added Ember as a Character. She can be found in Scenic Spot.
    • Added Sledgehammer as a Character. He can be found near Flopper Pond.

November 9th 2021

  • Added Shadow Ops as a Character. She can be found in Lazy Lake.

Update v18.40[]

November 16th 2021

  • Added Kakashi as a Character. He can be found in Primal Pond.
  • Added Rust Lord as a Character. He can be found in Compact Cars.

  • C3S1
  • C3S2
  • C3S3
  • C3S4

Update v19.00[]

December 5th 2021

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book for the new chapter, Featuring 20 NPCs to find at the start of the Season, and most likely many more to come.
  • While there are many Jonesys at The Joneses, only one will spawn per match besides Bunker Jonesy. This is true for both the characters at Camp Cuddles and Greasy Grove as well, with Cuddle Team Leader and Guaco being the constant characters to their respective locations.
  • The Chug Splash Characters have been removed.

Update v19.10[]

January 18th 2022

  • Added Haven as a Character. She can be found in Haven's Oasis.
  • Added Galactico as a Character. He can be found in Tilted Towers.
  • Tomatohead moved to Tilted Towers.

Update v19.20[]

February 1st 2022

  • Added Ronin as a Character. He can be found in Covert Cavern.
  • Added Gunnar as a Boss. He can be found in Covert Cavern.

Update v19.30[]

February 15th 2022

  • Bao Bros moved to Condo Canyon.

Update v20.00[]

March 20th 2022

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 24 total Characters, including 3 bosses.
  • At The Joneses and Camp Cuddle, Bunker Jonesy and Cuddle Team Leader are now included in the characters that do not have a guaranteed spawn, and can alter between Ludwig, Mullet Marauder and Jonesy the First (in The Joneses), and Metal Team Leader, Cuddlepool and Quackling (in Camp Cuddle).
  • Brainiac can now spawn every game in the forest areas between Sanctuary and The Joneses, due to him escaping his prison cell and wandering around.

Update v20.10[]

April 5th 2022

  • Huntmaster Saber moved to IO Airship - Daily.
    • Added new sound effects for his special abilities instead of reusing Wolverine and Doctor Slone's.

April 12th 2022

  • Imagined Order lost the Battle for The Daily Bugle Huntmaster Saber moved to IO Airship - Canyon.

Update v20.20[]

April 19th 2022

  • Imagined Order lost the Battle for Condo Canyon and Huntmaster Saber moved to IO Airship - Coney.

April 26th 2022

  • Imagined Order lost the Battle for Coney Crossroads and Huntmaster Saber moved to IO Airship - Rocky.

Update v20.30[]

May 3rd 2022

  • Imagined Order lost the Battle for Rocky Reels and Huntmaster Saber moved to IO Airship - Tilted.
  • Added Imperial Stormtroopers as a Character. They can be found in various Stormtrooper Checkpoints.
    • They're not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Doctor Strange as a Character. He can be found in The Daily Bugle.
  • Mancake moved to Butter Barn.
  • Tomatohead disappeared.

May 10th 2022

  • Imagined Order lost the Battle for Tilted Towers and Huntmaster Saber moved back to IO Airship - Cavern.

Update v20.40[]

May 17th 2022

  • Imperial Stormtroopers were removed.
  • Doctor Slone and Huntmaster Saber moved to The Collider.

Update v21.00[]

June 5th 2022

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 25 total Characters.

Update v21.10[]

June 21st 2022

  • Added Meowscles as a Character. He can be found in Scratch Pad.
  • Added The Order as a Character. She can be found in Seven Outpost IV.
  • Added Darth Vader as a Boss. He can be found in Imperial Docking Bays.

Update v21.20[]

July 6th 2022

  • Added Evie as a Character. She can be found in Syndicate Shoals.
  • Added Panther as a Character. She can be found in a Gas Station in the central part of the island.

Update v21.30[]

July 18th 2022

  • Added Summer Drift, Boardwalk Ruby and Unpeely as Characters for the No Sweat Summer event. They can be found on a beach near Sanctuary.
    • They're not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added The Underwriter as a Character. He can be found in Tilted Towers.
  • Added Beach Bomber as a Character. She can be found in Coney Crossroads.
  • The Foundation was removed. The Character Collection Book is glitched by this change.
  • Lil' Whip was also removed from the Character Collection Book, but he can still be found around Ice Cream Vans, as part of the No Sweat Summer event.

Update v21.40[]

August 16th 2022

  • Added Blackheart as a Character. He can be found in Lazy Lagoon.
  • Added Sabina as a Character. She can be found in Shell or High Water.
  • Added Bulma as a Character. She can be found in Kame House.
  • Lil' Whip, Summer Drift, Boardwalk Ruby and Unpeely were removed as No Sweat Summer Event ended.
  • The Visitor, The Imagined, and The Order were also removed.

Update v21.50[]

August 30th 2022

  • Bulma was removed as Dragon Ball Event ended.
  • The Origin, The Paradigm and The Scientist were also removed, even though they are still included in the collection book.

Update v22.00[]

September 18th 2022

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 22 total Characters.

Update v22.10[]

October 4th 2022

  • Added Meow Skulls as a Character. She can be found in Rave Cave.

Update v22.20[]

October 18th 2022

  • Added Chrome Punk as a Character. He can be found in Flutter Barn.
    • Although he is a Fortnitemares character, he is part of the Character Collection Book and stays for the rest of the season.
  • Added Curdle Scream Leader as a Character. They can be found near Tilted Towers.
    • They're not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Ash Williams as a Character. He can be found in The Knowby Cabin.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Willow as a Boss. She can be found in Willow's Haunt.
    • She's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added The Inkquisitor as a Boss. He can be found in Grim Gables.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.

Update v22.30[]

November 1st 2022

  • Willow, The Inkquisitor, Curdle Scream Leader and Ash Williams were removed as Fortnitemares 2022 Event ended.
  • Darth Vader returned as a Boss for Skywalker Week. He can be found in Imperial Docking Bay Eclipse.

November 8th 2022

  • Darth Vader was removed as the Skywalker Week ended.

Update v22.40[]

November 15th 2022

  • Added Agent Jones as a Character. He can be found near Fort Jonesy.
  • Added Bushranger as a Character. He can be found near Reality Tree.

  • C3S1
  • C4S2
  • C4S3
  • C4S4
  • C4SOG

Update v23.00[]

December 4th 2022

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 15 total Characters.
  • Added The Ageless Champion as a Boss. He can be found in The Citadel.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.

Update v23.10[]

December 13th 2022

  • Added Diamond Diva as a Character. She can be found in Meadow Mansion.

Update v23.20[]

January 18th 2023

  • Added Renegade Shadow as a Character. He can be found in Woodsy Ward.

Update v23.30[]

January 31st 2023

  • Added Rebel as a Character. She can be found in The Hall of Whispers.

Update v23.40[]

February 14th 2023

  • Added 3 bosses and 11 characters for Most Wanted event.
    • Chaos Double Agent can be found in Shattered Slabs.
    • Double Agent Hush can be found in Faulty Splits.
    • Gold Blooded Ace can be found in Brutal Bastion.
    • Guild can be found in Aegis Temple.
    • Sterling can be found in Rowdy Acres.
    • Inferno Recruit can be found in Anvil Square, Frenzy Fields or Lonely Labs.
    • Longshot can be found in Hitches and Ditches.
    • Zadie can be found in Secluded Spire.
    • Metal Mouth can be found in Slap 'N Go.
    • Insight can be found in Pleasant Passage.
    • Revolt can be found in Fridgeberg.
    • Goldie can be found in Solitary Shrine.
    • Cryptic can be found in a watchtower near Royal Ruin.
    • Mystify can be found in a watchtower near Forest Forge.
      • They're not part of the Character Collection Book.

Update v23.50[]

February 28th 2023

  • Most Wanted AIs were removed as Most Wanted Event ended.

Update v24.00[]

March 10th 2023

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 12 total Characters.
  • Added Triarch Nox as a Character. He can be found in Lonely Labs or near Windcatch Lake.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Highcard as a Boss. He can be found in MEGA City, Shattered Slabs and Brutal Bastion.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.

Update v24.10[]

March 29th 2023

  • Character Collection Book got a rehaul.
    • It now shows a map displaying the location of all Characters on the Island, both discovered and not discovered.
    • Services of discovered Characters can now be viewed.
  • New Specialist Characters got added.
    • Scout Specialists: Can ping nearby enemies and Chests. They use Sniper Rifles.
    • Heavy Specialists: Can also take more damage than other Specialists. They use Explosive Weapons.
    • Supply Specialist: Can drop ammunition and materials for players to pick up.
    • Medical Specialist: Can heal players with Chug Splashes to restore their Health and Shield.
  • Added Cluck as a Character. He can be found in Forest Forge.

Update v24.20[]

April 11th 2023

  • Added Dahlia as a Character. She can be found in a hut south of Beep 'n Bounce.
    • She's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Styx as a Character. He can be found in a hut south of The Herald Tree.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Serenade as a Character. She can be found in Marine Monoliths, Mossy Monoliths or Mountain Monoliths.
    • She's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Mystica as a Character. They can be found in Shattered Slabs.
  • Cluck no longer spawns at Forest Forge.

Update v24.30[]

May 2nd 2023

  • Added Imani as a Character. She can be found in a house north of The Autumnwood.
  • NEURALYNX no longer spawns at Windcatch Lake.

May 7th 2023

  • Added Clone Troopers as Characters. They can be found in Rift Encounters or at Clone Checkpoints.

May 12th 2023

  • Darth Vader returned as a Boss. He can be found near Beep 'n Bounce.
  • Clone Troopers were replaced by 501st Troopers.

Update v24.40[]

May 17th 2023

  • Added Renzo the Destroyer as a Character. He can be found in Brutal Bastion.
  • Added Highwire as a Character. She can be found in Kenjutsu Crossing.
  • Added Spider-Gwen as a Character. She can be found in Slappy Shores.

May 23rd 2023

  • Darth Vader and 501st Troopers were removed as Find the Force Event ended.

May 24th 2023

  • CRZ-8 no longer spawns at Bamboo Circle.

Update v25.00[]

June 9th 2023

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 16 total Characters.
  • Highcard can now be found in 3 more places:
    • Meadow Mansion, Eastern Watch and Secluded Spire.

Update v25.10[]

June 20th 2023

  • Added Triggerfish as a Character. He can be found near Seaside Sentry.
  • Added Bryne as a Character. She can be found near Burning Beacon.
  • Added Turk and Riptide as Characters. They can be found near Berg Barge.

Update v25.20[]

July 26th 2023

  • Added Stingray as a Character. He can be found in Frigid Frog.
  • Added Era as a Character. She can be found in Shady Stilts.
  • Added Princess Lexa as a Character. She can be found in The Citadel.
  • Added Bender as a Character. He can be found in MEGA City.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Innovator Slone moved to Rumble Ruins.

Update v25.30[]

August 8th 2023

  • Added Bushranger as a Character. He can be found near Rowdy Acres.
  • Added Garrison as a Character. He can be found in Watery Watch.
  • Stingray can now be found in Lonely Labyrinth.
  • Bender no longer spawns in MEGA City.
  • Innovator Slone is back at her original location.

Update v26.00[]

August 25th 2023

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 16 total Characters.
  • Added Kado Thorne as a Boss. He can be found in Eclipsed Estate.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Highcard was removed.

Update v26.10[]

September 12th 2023

  • Added Joni the Scarlet as a Character. She can be found near Kenjutsu Crossing.
  • Added Fishstick as a Character. He can be found in Sunswoon Lagoon.

Update v26.20[]

September 26th 2023

  • Added The Autumn Queen as a Character. She can be found in Forest Forge.
  • Added Shimmerdusk as a Character. She can be found in Windcatch Lake.
  • Added Phaedra as a Character. She can be found in The Apparatus.

Update v26.30[]

October 10th 2023

  • Added Mae as a Character. She can be found in Mesa's Reach.
  • Added Victoria Saint as a Character. She can be found in Woodsy Ward.
  • Added Agent Jones as a Character. He can be found in Frenzy Fields.
  • Added Mincemeat as a Character. He can be found in Southern Ruin.
  • Added Heartbreak Ranger as a Character. He replaced Love Ranger at Southern Ruin.
  • Added Phantom Meowscles as a Character. He replaced Meowscles near the Unnamed Frog Statue #5.
  • Added Bogstick as a Character. He replaced Fishstick at Sunswoon Lagoon.
  • Added Peely Bone as a Character. He replaced Agent Peely at Whispering Waters.
  • The Autumn Queen no longer spawns at Forest Forge.

Update v27.00[]

November 3rd 2023

  • For the first time since Chapter 2: Season 5, the Character Collection Book was removed.

  • C5S1
  • C5S2
  • C5S3
  • C5S4
  • REMIX

  • The Character Collection Book came back with 8 total Characters.

  • Added Holiday Boxy as a Character. She can be found in Ship It! Station.
  • Added Leelah as a Character. She can be found in Stormy Station.

Update v28.10[]

January 23rd 2024

  • Added Solid Snake as a Character. He can be found in the Unnamed Island.
  • Added Dara as a Character. She can be found in Lil 'Villa.
  • Added Starr Oakley as a Character. She can be found in Lovely Lodge.
  • Added Silas Hesk as a Character. He can be found in Ruined Reels.
  • Added April O'Neil as a Character. She can be found in Rescue Station.
  • Added Boxy as a Character. She can be found in The Other Other Windmill.
  • Leelah no longer has her Festive style on.
  • Holiday Boxy no longer spawns at Ship It! Station.

  • Added Snowheart as a Character. She can be found in a house near Zenith Wall.

  • Added Master Splinter as a Character. He can be found in the Turtle Lair.

Update v28.30[]

February 22nd 2024

  • Added Odyssey as a Character. She replaced Silas Hesk at Ruined Reels.
  • Added Sonor as a Character. He can be found in Slumberyard.
  • Added Lana Llane as a Character. She can be found in Llama Farm.

February 27th 2024

  • Master Splinter and April O'Neil no longer spawn.

Update v29.00[]

March 8th 2024

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 15 total Characters.

Update v29.01[]

March 19th 2024

  • Added Ascendant Midas as a Character. He can be found in The Marigold.

Update v29.10[]

March 26th 2024

  • Added Khari as a Character. She can be found in Pantheon Path.
  • Added Clara as a Character. She can be found in The Cemetery.
  • Added Jittershock as a Character. He can be found in Reclaimed Villa.
  • Added Etheria as a Character. She can be found in a house north of Restored Reels.
  • Ascendant Midas now has his Shade style on.

April 2nd 2024

  • Marigold, Jules, Skye and TNTina no longer spawn.
  • Brutus moved to The Marigold.
  • Ascendant Midas moved to Spawn Island.

Update v29.20[]

April 9th 2024

  • Brutus and Ascendant Midas no longer spawn.
  • Added Noorah as a Character. She can be found on a dock near Fencing Fields.
  • Added Charon as a Character. He can be found in Cloistered Castle.
  • Re-added Peely as a Character. He can be found in a camp near Restored Reels.

  • Added Aang, Zuko, Katara and Toph as a Characters. They can be found in different Elemental Shrines.

Update v29.30[]

April 23rd 2024

  • Added Graveheart as a Character. She can be found in The Cemetery.
  • Added Apollo as a Character. He can be found in Summit Temple.
  • Clara moved to Coastal Columns.

Update v29.40[]

  • Added Spirit Hunter Saeko as a Character. She can be found in Rebel's Roost.
  • Added Lavendra as a Character. She can be found in Classy Courts.
  • Added Dummy as a Character. He can be found in Piney Pumps.
  • Added Anwar as a Character. He can be found in Dumpenhausen.
  • Aang, Zuko, Katara and Toph no longer spawn in different Elemental Shrines.

Update v30.00[]

May 24th 2024

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 12 total Characters.
  • The Character Collection Book is now sorted in alphabetical order.
    • When Characters are added or removed, pre-existing Characters have their numbers adjusted.

Update v30.10[]

June 13th 2024

  • Added T-60 Power Armor as a Character. He can be found in Mesa Farm.
  • Added Riot as a Character. He can be found in Slumberyard.
  • Added Chopper as a Character. She can be found in Hazy Hillside Tunnel.
  • Added Power Chord as a Character. She can be found in Underworld Station.
  • Added Chiara as a Character. She can be found in Grand Glacier.
  • Added Backbone as a Character. He can be found in Rebel's Roost.
  • Re-added Bravo Leader as a Character. He can be found in Ship It! Station.

Update v30.20[]

June 22nd 2024

  • Re-added Dummy as a Character. He can be found in Piney Pumps.
  • Added Wastelander Magneto as a Character. He can be found in Brawler's Battleground.
  • Added Persephone as a Character. She can be found in The Underworld.
  • Added Drakon Steel Rider as a Character. He can be found in a gas station near Pleasant Piazza.

July 2nd 2024

  • Backbone, Power Chord, Riot and Chopper no longer spawn.

July 4th 2024

  • Added The Underwriter as a Character. He can be found in Beach Houses.

July 19th 2024

  • Added Captain Barbossa as a Character. He can be found in Shipwreck Shallows.
    • Added Jack Sparrow as a Character. He can be found near the former Coral Buddy Cave.
    • Added Davy Jones as a Character. He can be found on the shore near The Underworld.
    • Added Elizabeth Swann as a Character. She can be found in Pleasant Piazza.

Update v30.30[]

July 23rd 2024

  • Wasteland Dummy replaced Dummy in Piney Pumps.
  • Added Joey Caliente as a Character. He can be found in Primo Pumps.
  • Added Nisha as a Character. She can be found in Lavish Lair.

Update v30.40[]

August 6th 2024

  • Added Saskia as a Character. She can be found in The Cemetery.
  • Added The Operator as a Character. She can be found in Dumpenhausen.
  • Jack Sparrow, Captain Barbossa, Davy Jones and Elizabeth Swann no longer spawn.

Update v31.00[]

August 16th 2024

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 13 total Characters.
  • Added Emma Frost as a Boss. She can be found in The Raft.
    • She's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Mysterio as a Boss. He can be found in Doomstadt.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Doombot as a Boss. He can be found in Castle Doom.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.

  • Triage Trooper was disabled due to a bug.

  • Added Gwenpool as a Character. She can be found in Reckless Railways.
  • Triage Trooper was enabled.

Update v31.20[]

  • Added Iron Man as a Character. He can be found in The Other Windmill.

  • Added Dark Ruby as a Character. She can be found in Rebel's Roost.
  • Added Edward Scissorhands as a Character. He can be found in Grand Glacier.
  • Added Mephisto as a Character. He can be found in The Underworld.
  • Added Knightmare as a Character. She can be found in Mount Olympus.
  • Added Pumpkin King as a Character. He can be found in Restored Reels.
  • Peelverine was replaced by Peely Bone.
  • Added Ultima Carver as a Boss. He can be found in Brawler's Patch.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Added Billy as a Boss. He can be found in Freaky Fields.
    • He's not part of the Character Collection Book.
  • Character descriptions no longer feature lore.

  • Character Collection Book was removed for the second time.

Update v33.11[]

December 18th 2024

  • Added Durrr Taisho as a Character. He can be found in Seaport City.
  • Added Doughberman as a Character. He can be found in Twinkle Terrace.

December 20th 2024

  • Added 5 Characters for Winterfest.
    • Added Noir as a Character. He can be found in Seaport City.
    • Added Santa Suit Mariah as a Character. She can be found where she defrosted.
    • Added Santa Dogg as a Character. He can be found in Crackshot's Cabin.
    • Added Santa Shaq as a Character. He can be found in Masked Meadows.
    • Added Sgt. Winter as a Character. He can found at a crashed plane.

January 7th 2025

  • Noir, Santa Suit Mariah, Santa Dogg, Santa Shaq, and Sgt. Winter no longer spawn.

Update v33.20[]

January 14th 2025

  • Added The Night Rose as a Character that spawns after she is defeated as a Boss.
  • Doughberman and Vengeance Jones moved to a beach near Shattered Span.

Update v33.30[]

January 31st 2025

  • Added Goldie as a Character. She can be found at BURD.
  • Vengeance Jones is back in Hopeful Heights.
  • Doughberman moved to Masked Meadows.

February 10th 2025

  • Daigo moved to the portal near Warrior's Watch.

February 14th 2025

  • Daigo is longer on the Character Collection Book.

February 15th 2025

  • Jade was freed from the Spirit Realm and now spawns near Warrior's Watch as an excluded character.
    • Removed Daigo.

  • Revamped the Character Collection Book with 14 total Characters.

    • Han Solo now spawns at Outpost Enclave.

    • Luke Skywalker now spawns at the Rebel Outpost between Resistance Base and Shiny Shafts.

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • For a long period of time, there were 2 unused slots - 43 and 44 - for Characters, during Chapter 2: Season 5. These were later confirmed to be a visual error.
  • Every character that uses the Jonesy model had a description containing "MISSION LOG: - " during Chapter 2: Season 6, except for Bunker Jonesy.
  • Bunker Jonesy and Bushranger are the only two Characters to be in the first three Character Collection Books.
    • Bushranger also was the first NPC to be removed mid season, although he remained in the character book and could have been interacted with by attacking the tree that was left in his place.
  • Even though he could have been found on the Island and be interacted with during the Cosmic Summer Celebration, Beach Brutus was not part of the Chapter 2: Season 7 Character Collection Book. This may be because he was only available for a short period of time within the Season; he was unavailable after Cosmic Summer ended.
  • The Chapter 5: Season 1 and Chapter 4: Season 1 Character Collection Book are tied for the fewest amount of Characters of all Character Collection Books.
  • All of the NPCs in Chapter 3: Season 1 (aside from The Seven themselves) are implied to be loopers saved by The Seven according to a Fortnite blog post.
  • Starting Chapter 4: Season 1, the characters in the Collection Book used the Featured Image on display instead of the Icon.
    • It was changed with the release of the Update v24.10.
  • Starting in Chapter 5: Season 3, the Character Collection Book is in alphabetical order.
    • This means when Characters are added or removed, the Collection Book's order will slightly change.
  • Starting in Update v31.20, all characters in the Collection Book have no biographies.
    • Biographies from existing characters in Chapter 5: Season 4 are removed in this update.
  • Chapter 7: Season 2 is the only season that has more than one NPC with the same outfit.
Fan-made Fortnite wiki. Not affiliated with Epic Games.
About Epic Games
